---
title: "2Reg analysis"
format:
  html:
    df-print: paged
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
toc: true
crossref:
  chapters: true
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  fig.align: center
  dev: png
  cache: true
---

# Setup

```{r}

#| label: setup
#| include: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readxl)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tibble)
  library(openxlsx)
  library(lubridate)
  library(gtsummary)
  library(flextable)
  library(officer)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(rlang)
  library(survival)
  library(survminer)
})

DATA_DIR    <- "data"
TABLES_DIR  <- "tables"
GRAPHES_DIR <- "graphes"

dir.create(DATA_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(TABLES_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(GRAPHES_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

pick_path <- function(path_candidates) {
  hit <- path_candidates[file.exists(path_candidates)][1]
  if (is.na(hit)) stop("Файл не найден: ", basename(path_candidates[[1]]))
  hit
}

patients_rds <- pick_path(c(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, "patients_tidy.rds"),
  file.path("/mnt/data", DATA_DIR, "patients_tidy.rds"),
  "patients_tidy.rds"
))

ha_rds <- pick_path(c(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, "HA_tidy.rds"),
  file.path("/mnt/data", DATA_DIR, "HA_tidy.rds"),
  "HA_tidy.rds"
))

dict_file <- pick_path(c(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, "2Reg_Dictionary_tidy.xlsx"),
  file.path("/mnt/data", DATA_DIR, "2Reg_Dictionary_tidy.xlsx"),
  "2Reg_Dictionary_tidy.xlsx"
))

diag_file_candidates <- c(
  file.path(DATA_DIR, "2Reg_diagnoses.xlsx"),
  file.path("/mnt/data", DATA_DIR, "2Reg_diagnoses.xlsx"),
  "2Reg_diagnoses.xlsx"
)
diag_file <- diag_file_candidates[file.exists(diag_file_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(diag_file)) diag_file <- NA_character_

patients_tidy <- readRDS(patients_rds)
HA_tidy       <- readRDS(ha_rds)

# Убираем переведенных из других ОРИТ, TRUE/FALSE
exclude_other_icu_transfer <- FALSE

if (exclude_other_icu_transfer) {
  ids_exclude <- patients_tidy %>%
    distinct(pat_record_id, from_other_ICU_transfer) %>%
    filter(from_other_ICU_transfer == "Да") %>%
    pull(pat_record_id)

  patients_tidy <- patients_tidy %>%
    filter(!pat_record_id %in% ids_exclude)

  HA_tidy <- HA_tidy %>%
    filter(!pat_record_id %in% ids_exclude)
}

dict <- read_excel(dict_file, col_types = "text") %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
  transmute(
    dataset = str_squish(str_replace_all(as.character(dataset), "\u00A0", " ")),
    short   = str_squish(str_replace_all(as.character(short), "\u00A0", " ")),
    ru      = str_squish(str_replace_all(as.character(ru), "\u00A0", " ")),
    kind    = str_squish(str_replace_all(as.character(kind), "\u00A0", " "))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dataset = case_when(
      str_to_lower(dataset) %in% c("patients_tidy", "patients", "patient") ~ "patients",
      str_to_lower(dataset) %in% c("ha_tidy", "ha") ~ "ha",
      TRUE ~ str_to_lower(dataset)
    )
  )

dict_pat <- dict %>%
  filter(dataset == "patients", kind %in% c("static", "time"))

dict_ha <- dict %>%
  filter(dataset == "ha", !is.na(short), short != "") %>%
  group_by(short) %>%
  summarise(ru = first(na.omit(ru)), .groups = "drop")

diag_wide <- NULL
if (!is.na(diag_file)) {
  diag_wide <- tryCatch(readxl::read_excel(diag_file, sheet = 2), error = function(e) NULL)
}

fmt_int <- function(x) formatC(as.integer(round(x)), format = "f", digits = 0)
fmt_1   <- function(x) formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 1)
fmt_2   <- function(x) formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2)

norm_txt <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- stringr::str_replace_all(x, "\u00A0", " ")
  x <- stringr::str_replace_all(x, "[\u2212\u2013\u2014]", "-")
  x <- stringr::str_squish(x)
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  x
}

pat_gram_stain_for_tables <- function(x) {
  x <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(x) ~ NA_character_,
    as.character(x) == "mix"   ~ "Смешанные",
    as.character(x) == "gram+" ~ "Грамположительные",
    as.character(x) == "gram-" ~ "Грамотрицательные",
    as.character(x) == "neg"   ~ "Отрицательный посев",
    as.character(x) == "N/A"   ~ "Посев не проводился",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  factor(
    x,
    levels = c(
      "Смешанные",
      "Грамположительные",
      "Грамотрицательные",
      "Отрицательный посев",
      "Посев не проводился"
    )
  )
}
```

# Пациенты gtsummary

```{r}
#| label: gtsummary_pat
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

# В этом чанке собираем большую пациентскую summary-таблицу из двух частей:
# 1) "верх" — одна строка на пациента на baseline (m12h_0h);
# 2) "низ" — динамика лаборатории и шкал по timepoint.
tp_top <- "m12h_0h"
tps_bottom <- c("m12h_0h", "48h_72h", "4d_6d", "7d_10d")
show_antibiotics <- FALSE  # временно скрыто

# RU-лейблы из словаря (dict_pat уже создан в ETL)
ru_map <- dict_pat %>%
  distinct(short, ru) %>%
  filter(!is.na(short), short != "", !is.na(ru), ru != "") %>%
  tibble::deframe()

ru_or <- function(key) {
  x <- unname(ru_map[[key]])
  if (is.null(x) || is.na(x) || x == "") key else x
}

unit_mode <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_character_)
  names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
}

lab_u <- function(base_ru, unit) {
  if (!is.na(unit) && unit != "") paste0(base_ru, " (", unit, ")") else base_ru
}

# ---------------- data: верх (только m12h_0h) ----------------
pt_top <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint == tp_top) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    vasopressors_if_used = case_when(
      str_to_lower(vasopressors_if_used) == "да"  ~ "Да",
      str_to_lower(vasopressors_if_used) == "нет" ~ "Нет",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    vasopressors_if_used = factor(vasopressors_if_used, levels = c("Да","Нет"))
  )

if (isTRUE(show_antibiotics) && "antibiotics_start_dt" %in% names(pt_top)) {
  pt_top <- pt_top %>%
    mutate(
      antibiotics_started = if_else(!is.na(antibiotics_start_dt), "Да", "Нет"),
      antibiotics_started = factor(antibiotics_started, levels = c("Да","Нет"))
    )
}

# ---------------- HA: counts (HA1 timing уже в patients_tidy) ----------------
ha_counts <- HA_tidy %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, CT_count, LPS_count) %>%
  mutate(
    CT_count  = coalesce(as.integer(CT_count),  0L),
    LPS_count = coalesce(as.integer(LPS_count), 0L),
    devices_total = CT_count + LPS_count
  )

pt_top <- pt_top %>%
  left_join(ha_counts, by = "pat_record_id") %>%
  mutate(
    HA1_start_dt = first_sorption_dt,

    # исключаем 0 из разбивки по типам устройств на пациента (0 -> NA)
    CT_count_pos      = if_else(!is.na(CT_count) & CT_count > 0, as.integer(CT_count), NA_integer_),
    LPS_count_pos     = if_else(!is.na(LPS_count) & LPS_count > 0, as.integer(LPS_count), NA_integer_),
    devices_total_pos = if_else(!is.na(devices_total) & devices_total > 0, as.integer(devices_total), NA_integer_),

    # ----- RRT/MV required относительно HA1_start_dt -----
    RRT_if_used = case_when(
      is.na(RRT_start_dt) ~ "Нет",
      is.na(HA1_start_dt) ~ NA_character_,
      HA1_start_dt >= (RRT_start_dt - hours(12)) &
        (is.na(RRT_resolution_dt) | HA1_start_dt <= RRT_resolution_dt) ~ "Да",
      TRUE ~ "Нет"
    ),
    MV_if_used = case_when(
      is.na(MV_start_dt) ~ "Нет",
      is.na(HA1_start_dt) ~ NA_character_,
      HA1_start_dt >= (MV_start_dt - hours(12)) &
        (is.na(MV_resolution_dt) | HA1_start_dt <= MV_resolution_dt) ~ "Да",
      TRUE ~ "Нет"
    ),

    RRT_if_used = factor(RRT_if_used, levels = c("Да","Нет")),
    MV_if_used  = factor(MV_if_used,  levels = c("Да","Нет")),

    # ---------------- outcome -> binary for logit ----------------
    # 0 = "Умер", 1 = "Выписан из ОРИТ".
    # Все остальные значения оставляем NA (исключаются из модели),
    # чтобы не смешивать "переведён/продолжает лечение" с исходом.
    outcome_std = str_to_lower(str_squish(as.character(outcome))),
    # ---------------- outcome -> binary for logit (в этой версии: 1 = смерть, 0 = выписан/продолжает) ----------------
    outcome_logit = case_when(
      is.na(outcome_std) ~ NA_integer_,
      str_detect(outcome_std, "умер|смерт") ~ 1L,
      str_detect(outcome_std, "выпис") ~ 0L,
      str_detect(outcome_std, "продолж|наход") ~ 0L,  # "Продолжает находиться в ОРИТ" -> 0
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    outcome_logit = factor(outcome_logit, levels = c(0, 1)))

# ---------------- верхняя часть  ----------------
pt_top <- pt_top %>%
  mutate(
    pat_gram_stain = pat_gram_stain_for_tables(pat_gram_stain)
  )

vars_top <- c(
  "age_yr","sex","BMI","ICU_6_month_history","from_other_ICU_transfer",
  "icu_to_HA1_hours",
  "vasopressors_if_used","RRT_if_used","MV_if_used",
  "charlson_index",
  "pat_bacteremia","pat_gram_stain","pat_fungal",
  "CT_count_pos","LPS_count_pos","devices_total_pos",
  "HA_efficency_CGI_E","outcome"
)

lbl_top <- list(
  age_yr = ru_or("age_yr"),
  sex = ru_or("sex"),
  BMI = ru_or("BMI"),
  ICU_6_month_history = ru_or("ICU_6_month_history"),
  from_other_ICU_transfer = ru_or("from_other_ICU_transfer"),
  icu_to_HA1_hours = "Время между поступлением в ОРИТ и началом ГС, ч",
  vasopressors_if_used = "Потребность в вазопрессорах",
  RRT_if_used = "Потребность в ЗПТ",
  MV_if_used  = "Потребность в ИВЛ",
  charlson_index = ru_or("charlson_index"),
  pat_bacteremia = ru_or("pat_bacteremia"),
  pat_gram_stain = "Бактериальная флора по Граму",
  pat_fungal = ru_or("pat_fungal"),
  CT_count_pos = "Устройств CT на пациента, n",
  LPS_count_pos = "Устройств LPS на пациента, n",
  devices_total_pos = "Всего устройств на пациента, n",
  HA_efficency_CGI_E = ru_or("HA_efficency_CGI_E"),
  outcome = ru_or("outcome")
)

type_top  <- list(
  vasopressors_if_used ~ "dichotomous",
  RRT_if_used ~ "dichotomous",
  MV_if_used ~ "dichotomous"
)

value_top <- list(
  vasopressors_if_used ~ "Да",
  RRT_if_used ~ "Да",
  MV_if_used ~ "Да"
)

if (isTRUE(show_antibiotics) && "antibiotics_started" %in% names(pt_top)) {
  vars_top <- c(vars_top, "antibiotics_started")
  lbl_top$antibiotics_started <- "Антибиотики начаты (дата заполнена)"
  type_top  <- c(type_top,  list(antibiotics_started ~ "dichotomous"))
  value_top <- c(value_top, list(antibiotics_started ~ "Да"))
}

lbl_top <- lbl_top[names(lbl_top) %in% vars_top]


stat_top <- list(
  all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
  all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})"
)

tbl_top <- pt_top %>%
  select(any_of(vars_top)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    type = type_top,
    value = value_top,
    statistic = stat_top,
    label = lbl_top,
    missing = "no"
  )

# ------------ показания к гемосорбции (diag_wide уже загружен в ETL) ------------
tbl_indications <- NULL
diag_n <- NA_integer_

if (!is.null(diag_wide) && "pat_record_id" %in% names(diag_wide)) {
  diag_wide2 <- diag_wide %>%
    mutate(pat_record_id = as.character(pat_record_id)) %>%
    semi_join(pt_top %>% select(pat_record_id), by = "pat_record_id")

  diag_n <- nrow(diag_wide2)
  diag_cols <- setdiff(names(diag_wide2), "pat_record_id")

  count_yes <- function(v) {
    v <- as.character(v)
    v <- str_to_lower(str_squish(v))
    sum(v %in% c("1","да","yes","true"), na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  if (diag_n > 0 && length(diag_cols) > 0) {
    dx_order <- diag_wide2 %>%
      summarise(across(all_of(diag_cols), count_yes)) %>%
      pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "dx", values_to = "n_yes") %>%
      arrange(desc(n_yes), dx) %>%
      pull(dx)

    diag_tbl <- diag_wide2 %>%
      mutate(across(all_of(dx_order), ~ factor(
        if_else(as.character(.) %in% c("1","Да","да","TRUE","true"), "Да", "Нет"),
        levels = c("Да","Нет")
      ))) %>%
      select(all_of(dx_order))

    tbl_indications <- diag_tbl %>%
      tbl_summary(
        type = everything() ~ "dichotomous",
        value = everything() ~ "Да",
        statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})",
        label = rlang::set_names(as.list(dx_order), dx_order),
        missing = "no"
      )
  }
}

# ---------------- нижняя часть (колонки по timepoint) ----------------
pt_bottom <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% tps_bottom) %>%
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tps_bottom)) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE)

u_lactate <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$lactate_unit)
u_creat   <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$creatinine_unit)
u_albumin <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$albumin_unit)
u_crp     <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$C_react_protein_unit)
u_pct     <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$procalcitonin_unit)
u_ddimer  <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$D_dimer_unit)
u_fibr    <- unit_mode(pt_bottom$fibrinogen_unit)

vars_bottom <- c(
  "SOFA","VIS2020","PaFiO2_calc",
  "lactate","creatinine","albumin","C_react_protein",
  "procalcitonin","D_dimer","fibrinogen",
  "leucocytes","lymphocytes","neutrophils","NLR",
  "thrombocytes"
)

lbl_bottom <- list(
  SOFA = ru_or("SOFA"),
  VIS2020 = ru_or("VIS2020"),
  PaFiO2_calc = paste0(ru_or("PaFiO2"), " (расч. по SpFiO2)"),
  lactate = lab_u(ru_or("lactate"), u_lactate),
  creatinine = lab_u(ru_or("creatinine"), u_creat),
  albumin = lab_u(ru_or("albumin"), u_albumin),
  C_react_protein = lab_u(ru_or("C_react_protein"), u_crp),
  procalcitonin = lab_u(ru_or("procalcitonin"), u_pct),
  D_dimer = lab_u(ru_or("D_dimer"), u_ddimer),
  fibrinogen = lab_u(ru_or("fibrinogen"), u_fibr),
  leucocytes = ru_or("leucocytes"),
  lymphocytes = ru_or("lymphocytes"),
  neutrophils = ru_or("neutrophils"),
  NLR = "NLR (нейтрофилы/лимфоциты)",
  thrombocytes = ru_or("thrombocytes")
)
lbl_bottom <- lbl_bottom[names(lbl_bottom) %in% vars_bottom]

tbl_bottom <- pt_bottom %>%
  select(timepoint, any_of(vars_bottom)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = timepoint,
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})"),
    digits = list(NLR ~ 2),
    label = lbl_bottom,
    missing = "no"
  )

# ---------------- итог: верх (+показания) + низ ----------------
tbls <- list(tbl_top)
hdrs <- c("Общие характеристики")

if (!is.null(tbl_indications)) {
  tbls <- c(tbls, list(tbl_indications))
  hdrs <- c(hdrs, sprintf("Показания к гемосорбции (n=%d)", diag_n))
}

tbls <- c(tbls, list(tbl_bottom))
hdrs <- c(hdrs, "Параметры по временным точкам")

tbl_pat <- tbl_stack(tbls, group_header = hdrs) %>%
  modify_table_styling(rows = row_type == "label", columns = label, text_format = "bold") %>%
  modify_table_styling(rows = row_type %in% c("group_header", "group"), columns = label, text_format = "bold") %>%
  modify_caption("**2Reg: сводная таблица по пациентам**") %>%
  modify_header(label = "**Параметр**")

tbl_pat
```

# Корреляции (m12h_0h)

```{r}

#| label: kendall_corr_m12h_0h
#| cache: false
#| echo: false

# Смотрим попарные связи между количественными переменными на baseline.
# Выбран коэффициент Кенделла, потому что он устойчивее для небольших выборок
# и не требует нормального распределения.
vars_corr <- c(
  "age_yr","BMI","SOFA","icu_to_HA1_hours","VIS2020","PaFiO2_calc",
  "lactate","creatinine","albumin","C_react_protein","procalcitonin",
  "D_dimer","fibrinogen","leucocytes","lymphocytes","neutrophils","NLR",
  "thrombocytes"
)

pt_corr <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint == "m12h_0h") %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(any_of(vars_corr)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.))))

# Убираем переменные, где <2 наблюдений (иначе cor() даст NA по всей строке/колонке)
keep_vars <- names(pt_corr)[purrr::map_lgl(pt_corr, ~ sum(!is.na(.x)) >= 2)]
pt_corr <- pt_corr %>% select(all_of(keep_vars))


if (ncol(pt_corr) >= 2) {
  cor_mat <- cor(pt_corr, method = "kendall", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

  # Матрица корреляций (округление для вывода)
  print(round(cor_mat, 2))

  # Кореллограмма (heatmap)
cor_mat <- cor(pt_corr, method = "kendall", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# оставляем нижний треугольник + диагональ
cor_mat_tri <- cor_mat
cor_mat_tri[upper.tri(cor_mat_tri, diag = FALSE)] <- NA

# Печать матрицы (будет треугольником)
print(round(cor_mat_tri, 2))

# Таблица для ggplot
cor_tbl <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat_tri)) %>%
  rename(var1 = Var1, var2 = Var2, tau = Freq) %>%
  mutate(
    var1 = factor(var1, levels = colnames(cor_mat_tri)),
    var2 = factor(var2, levels = colnames(cor_mat_tri))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tau))

ggplot(cor_tbl, aes(var1, var2, fill = tau)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", tau)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Kendall τ, m12h_0h",
    fill = "Kendall τ"
  )
} else {
  cat("Недостаточно данных для расчёта корреляций (нужно ≥2 переменных с ≥2 наблюдениями).\n")
}

```

# Spearman

```{r}

#| label: corr_spearman_prep
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(corrplot)

timepoint_t0 <- "m12h_0h"
timepoint_t1 <- "48h_72h"

clean_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_squish(str_to_lower(x))
  x[x %in% c("", "na", "n/a", "нет данных", "нет значения")] <- NA_character_
  x
}

yes01 <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_chr(x)

  case_when(
    x %in% c("да", "yes", "true", "1") ~ 1,
    x %in% c("нет", "no", "false", "0") ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
}

bin_from_any <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.numeric(x))

  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    return(case_when(
      x == 1 ~ 1,
      x == 0 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ))
  }

  yes01(x)
}

num_from_any <- function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(as.numeric(x))

  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00A0", " ")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, ",", ".")
  x <- str_extract(x, "-?\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?")
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

present01 <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_chr(x)

  case_when(
    is.na(x) ~ NA_real_,
    x %in% c("нет", "no", "false", "0") ~ 0,
    str_detect(x, "не было|не примен|отсутств|без особенностей") ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ 1
  )
}

first_non_na <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) NA else x[1]
}

culture01 <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_chr(x)

  case_when(
    str_detect(x, "полож") ~ 1,
    str_detect(x, "отриц") ~ 0,
    str_detect(x, "не провод") ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
}

icu_col <- intersect(c("ICU_in_dt", "ICU_in_datetime"), names(patients_tidy))[1]
outcome_dt_col <- intersect(c("ICU_out_or_death_dt", "ICU_out_or_death_datetime"), names(patients_tidy))[1]
ha_start_col <- intersect(c("HA_start_datetime", "HA_start_dt"), names(HA_tidy))[1]

if (is.na(icu_col)) stop("Не найдена колонка ICU_in_datetime / ICU_in_dt")
if (is.na(outcome_dt_col)) stop("Не найдена колонка ICU_out_or_death_dt / ICU_out_or_death_datetime")
if (is.na(ha_start_col)) stop("Не найдена колонка HA_start_datetime / HA_start_dt")

#Кодируем показатели первой сорбции

ha_corr_src <- HA_tidy

if (!"HA_cartrige_type_std" %in% names(ha_corr_src)) {
  ha_corr_src <- ha_corr_src %>%
    mutate(
      HA_cartrige_type_std = case_when(
        str_detect(str_to_upper(HA_cartrige_type), "LPS") ~ "LPS",
        str_detect(str_to_upper(HA_cartrige_type), "CT|ЦТ") ~ "CT",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}

ha_first_corr <- ha_corr_src %>%
  filter(HA_parameter == "Гемоперфузия 1") %>%
  rename(HA1_start_datetime = all_of(ha_start_col)) %>%
  arrange(pat_record_id, HA1_start_datetime) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    HA_anticoagulation_corr = case_when(
      str_detect(clean_chr(HA_anticoagulation_other), "без антикоаг") ~ "Без антикоагуляции",
      str_detect(clean_chr(HA_anticoagulation), "без антикоаг") ~ "Без антикоагуляции",
      clean_chr(HA_anticoagulation) == "цитрат" ~ "Цитрат",
      clean_chr(HA_anticoagulation) == "гепарин" ~ "Гепарин",
      str_detect(clean_chr(HA_anticoagulation), "^друг") ~ "Другое",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    HA_anticoag_citrate = as.integer(HA_anticoagulation_corr == "Цитрат"),
    HA_anticoag_heparin = as.integer(HA_anticoagulation_corr == "Гепарин"),
    HA_anticoag_none = as.integer(HA_anticoagulation_corr == "Без антикоагуляции"),
    HA_anticoag_other = as.integer(HA_anticoagulation_corr == "Другое"),

    first_sorption_LPS = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(HA_cartrige_type_std), "LPS") ~ 1,
      !is.na(HA_cartrige_type_std) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    HA_other_methods_bin = present01(HA_other_methods),
    HA_adverse_effects_bin = present01(HA_adverse_effects)
  ) %>%
  select(
    pat_record_id,
    HA1_start_datetime,
    any_of(c("HA_duration", "HA_avg_blood_flow")),
    first_sorption_LPS,
    HA_anticoag_citrate,
    HA_anticoag_heparin,
    HA_anticoag_none,
    HA_anticoag_other,
    HA_other_methods_bin,
    HA_adverse_effects_bin
  )

#Собираем T0-датасет и исходы

patients_tidy_corr <- patients_tidy %>%
  mutate(
    NLR = if_else(
      !is.na(lymphocytes) & lymphocytes > 0,
      neutrophils / lymphocytes,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

has_icu_to_ha1 <- "icu_to_HA1_hours" %in% names(patients_tidy_corr)

corr_t0 <- patients_tidy_corr %>%
  filter(timepoint == timepoint_t0) %>%
  arrange(pat_record_id) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    icu_to_HA1_hours_from_patients = if (has_icu_to_ha1) {
      as.numeric(icu_to_HA1_hours)
    } else {
      NA_real_
    }
  ) %>%
  left_join(ha_first_corr, by = "pat_record_id") %>%
  mutate(
    outcome_days = as.numeric(
      difftime(.data[[outcome_dt_col]], .data[[icu_col]], units = "days")
    ),

    icu_to_HA1_hours_calc = as.numeric(
      difftime(HA1_start_datetime, .data[[icu_col]], units = "hours")
    ),

    icu_to_HA1_hours = coalesce(
      icu_to_HA1_hours_from_patients,
      icu_to_HA1_hours_calc
    ),

    outcome_dead_bin = case_when(
      clean_chr(outcome) == "умер" ~ 1,
      clean_chr(outcome) == "выписан из орит" ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    sex_male_bin = case_when(
      str_detect(clean_chr(sex), "муж|male|^м$|^m$") ~ 1,
      str_detect(clean_chr(sex), "жен|female|^ж$|^f$") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    vasopressors_if_used_bin = yes01(vasopressors_if_used),
    RRT_if_used_bin = yes01(RRT_if_used),
    MV_if_used_bin = yes01(MV_if_used),
    from_other_ICU_transfer_bin = yes01(from_other_ICU_transfer),
    ICU_6_month_history_bin = yes01(ICU_6_month_history),

culture_gram_plus_bin = as.numeric(is_pat_gram_plus),
culture_gram_minus_bin = as.numeric(is_pat_gram_minus),

culture_bacteremia_bin = coalesce(
  as.numeric(is_bacteremic),
  culture01(pat_bacteremia)
),

culture_fungal_bin = culture01(pat_fungal)

  ) %>%
  select(-icu_to_HA1_hours_from_patients, -icu_to_HA1_hours_calc)

add_optional_bin <- function(df, target, candidates) {
  source <- candidates[candidates %in% names(df)][1]
  df[[target]] <- if (!is.na(source)) bin_from_any(df[[source]]) else NA_real_
  df
}

add_optional_numeric <- function(df, target, candidates) {
  source <- candidates[candidates %in% names(df)][1]
  df[[target]] <- if (!is.na(source)) num_from_any(df[[source]]) else NA_real_
  df
}

corr_t0 <- corr_t0 %>%
  add_optional_bin("is_septic_bin", c("is_septic")) %>%
  add_optional_bin("ECMO_if_used_bin", c("ECMO_if_used", "ECMO_required")) %>%
  add_optional_bin("is_lps_72h", c("is_lps_72h")) %>%
  add_optional_numeric("avg_BP", c("avg_BP", "mean_BP", "MAP")) %>%
  add_optional_numeric("PaFiO2", c("PaFiO2")) %>%
  add_optional_numeric("SpFiO2", c("SpFiO2")) %>%
  add_optional_numeric(
    "vasopressors_dur_hours",
    c("vasopressors_dur_hours", "vasopressors_duration_hours", "vasopressors_duration_h", "vasopressors_duration")
  ) %>%
  add_optional_numeric(
    "RRT_dur_hours",
    c("RRT_dur_hours", "RRT_duration_hours", "RRT_duration_h", "RRT_duration")
  ) %>%
  add_optional_numeric(
    "MV_dur_hours",
    c("MV_dur_hours", "MV_duration_hours", "MV_duration_h", "MV_duration")
  ) %>%
  add_optional_numeric(
    "ECMO_dur_hours",
    c("ECMO_dur_hours", "ECMO_duration_hours", "ECMO_duration_h", "ECMO_duration")
  )

# Добавляем “склонность исхода”
# ранняя смерть < поздняя смерть < продолжает находиться в ОРИТ < поздняя выписка < ранняя выписка

max_death_day <- max(
  corr_t0$outcome_days[clean_chr(corr_t0$outcome) == "умер"],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

max_discharge_day <- max(
  corr_t0$outcome_days[clean_chr(corr_t0$outcome) == "выписан из орит"],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

if (!is.finite(max_death_day)) max_death_day <- 0
if (!is.finite(max_discharge_day)) max_discharge_day <- 0

outcome_score_shift <- max_death_day + max_discharge_day + 2
outcome_continues_score <- max_death_day + 1

corr_t0 <- corr_t0 %>%
  mutate(
    outcome_propensity = case_when(
      clean_chr(outcome) == "умер" ~ outcome_days,
      clean_chr(outcome) == "выписан из орит" ~ outcome_score_shift - outcome_days,
      str_detect(clean_chr(outcome), "продолжает|перевед") ~ outcome_continues_score,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# Динамика 0–48 часов

dyn_vars <- c(
  "SOFA",
  "VIS2020_0_excl",
  "thrombocytes",
  "lymphocytes",
  "neutrophils",
  "NLR",
  "creatinine",
  "C_react_protein",
  "bilirubin_total"
)

dyn_vars <- intersect(dyn_vars, names(patients_tidy_corr))

patients_dyn_wide <- patients_tidy_corr %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c(timepoint_t0, timepoint_t1)) %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, all_of(dyn_vars)) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id, timepoint) %>%
  summarise(
    across(all_of(dyn_vars), first_non_na),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = timepoint,
    values_from = all_of(dyn_vars),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{timepoint}"
  )

for (v in dyn_vars) {
  t0_col <- paste0(v, "_", timepoint_t0)
  t1_col <- paste0(v, "_", timepoint_t1)
  delta_col <- paste0("delta_", v)

  if (all(c(t0_col, t1_col) %in% names(patients_dyn_wide))) {
    patients_dyn_wide[[delta_col]] <- patients_dyn_wide[[t1_col]] - patients_dyn_wide[[t0_col]]
  }
}

patients_dyn_delta <- patients_dyn_wide %>%
  select(pat_record_id, starts_with("delta_")) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ recode(
      .x,
      "delta_VIS2020_0_excl" = "delta_VIS2020",
      "delta_thrombocytes" = "delta_PLT",
      "delta_lymphocytes" = "delta_LYM",
      "delta_neutrophils" = "delta_NEU",
      "delta_creatinine" = "delta_Crea",
      "delta_C_react_protein" = "delta_CRP",
      "delta_bilirubin_total" = "delta_bilirubin"
    ),
    starts_with("delta_")
  )

# Кодируем HA_efficency_CGI_E как ordered factor без новой переменной

corr_full <- corr_t0 %>%
  left_join(patients_dyn_delta, by = "pat_record_id")

cgi_levels <- c(
  "Без изменений или хуже",
  "Минимальное улучшение. Незначительное улучшение, не влияющее на клинический статус пациента",
  "Умеренное улучшение. Частичная ремиссия симптомов",
  "Отмечено значительное улучшение. Полная или почти полная ремиссия симптомов"
)

if ("HA_efficency_CGI_E" %in% names(corr_full)) {
  cgi_unknown <- setdiff(
    unique(na.omit(as.character(corr_full$HA_efficency_CGI_E))),
    cgi_levels
  )

  if (length(cgi_unknown) > 0) {
    warning(
      "Есть значения HA_efficency_CGI_E, которых нет в cgi_levels: ",
      paste(cgi_unknown, collapse = "; ")
    )
  }

  corr_full <- corr_full %>%
    mutate(
      HA_efficency_CGI_E = factor(
        HA_efficency_CGI_E,
        levels = cgi_levels,
        ordered = TRUE
      )
    )

  attr(corr_full$HA_efficency_CGI_E, "label") <-
    "Эффективность сорбции по CGI-E, упорядоченный фактор"
}

# Собираем числовой датасет для коррелограммы
diag_vars <- names(corr_full)[str_detect(names(corr_full), "^diag_bin_")]
ind_vars  <- names(corr_full)[str_detect(names(corr_full), "^ind_bin_")]

culture_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "culture_gram_plus_bin",
    "culture_gram_minus_bin",
    "culture_bacteremia_bin",
    "culture_fungal_bin"
  ),
  names(corr_full)
)

corr_full <- corr_full %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      any_of(c(
        diag_vars,
        ind_vars,
        culture_vars,
        "ICU_6_month_history_bin",
        "is_septic_bin",
        "ECMO_if_used_bin",
        "is_lps_72h",
        "first_sorption_LPS"
      )),
      as.numeric
    )
  )

corr_vars <- c(
  # антроподемография
  "age_yr",
  "sex_male_bin",
  "BMI",
  "charlson_index",
  "ICU_6_month_history_bin",

  # клиника на T0
  "SOFA",
  "VIS2020_0_excl",
  "PaFiO2_calc",
  "PaFiO2",
  "SpFiO2",
  "avg_BP",
  "vasopressors_if_used_bin",
  "RRT_if_used_bin",
  "MV_if_used_bin",
  "ECMO_if_used_bin",
  "from_other_ICU_transfer_bin",
  "is_septic_bin",
  "vasopressors_dur_hours",
  "RRT_dur_hours",
  "MV_dur_hours",
  "ECMO_dur_hours",

  # посевы
  culture_vars,

  # диагнозы и показания
  diag_vars,
  ind_vars,

  # лабораторка на T0
  "lactate",
  "creatinine",
  "albumin",
  "C_react_protein",
  "procalcitonin",
  "D_dimer",
  "fibrinogen",
  "leucocytes",
  "lymphocytes",
  "neutrophils",
  "NLR",
  "thrombocytes",
  "bilirubin_total",

  # время и сорбция
  "icu_to_HA1_hours",
  "HA_duration",
  "HA_avg_blood_flow",
  "first_sorption_LPS",
  "is_lps_72h",
  "HA_anticoag_citrate",
  "HA_anticoag_heparin",
  "HA_anticoag_none",
  "HA_anticoag_other",
  "HA_other_methods_bin",
  "HA_adverse_effects_bin",
  "HA_efficency_CGI_E",

  # динамика 0–48
  "delta_SOFA",
  "delta_VIS2020",
  "delta_PLT",
  "delta_LYM",
  "delta_NEU",
  "delta_NLR",
  "delta_Crea",
  "delta_CRP",
  "delta_bilirubin",

  # исходы
  "outcome_days",
  "outcome_dead_bin",
  "outcome_propensity"
)

corr_vars <- intersect(corr_vars, names(corr_full))

corr_numeric <- corr_full %>%
  select(all_of(corr_vars)) %>%
  mutate(
    across(where(is.ordered), as.integer),
    across(where(is.logical), as.integer)
  ) %>%
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  select(
    where(
      ~ sum(!is.na(.x)) >= 5 &&
        n_distinct(.x, na.rm = TRUE) > 1
    )
  )

# Spearman + p-values + corrplot -----------------------------------------

min_pair_n <- 5

cor_matrix_safe <- function(x, method = "spearman", min_n = 5) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x)
  n <- ncol(x)

  r <- matrix(
    NA_real_,
    nrow = n,
    ncol = n,
    dimnames = list(names(x), names(x))
  )

  diag(r) <- 1

  if (n < 2) return(r)

  for (i in seq_len(n - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):n) {
      ok <- complete.cases(x[, c(i, j)])

      xi <- x[[i]][ok]
      xj <- x[[j]][ok]

      if (
        length(xi) >= min_n &&
        n_distinct(xi, na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        n_distinct(xj, na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        sd(xi, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 &&
        sd(xj, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
      ) {
        r_ij <- suppressWarnings(
          cor(
            xi,
            xj,
            method = method,
            use = "complete.obs"
          )
        )

        r[i, j] <- r_ij
        r[j, i] <- r_ij
      }
    }
  }

  r
}

cor_pmat <- function(x, method = "spearman", min_n = 5) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x)
  n <- ncol(x)

  p <- matrix(
    NA_real_,
    nrow = n,
    ncol = n,
    dimnames = list(names(x), names(x))
  )

  diag(p) <- 0

  if (n < 2) return(p)

  for (i in seq_len(n - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):n) {
      ok <- complete.cases(x[, c(i, j)])

      xi <- x[[i]][ok]
      xj <- x[[j]][ok]

      if (
        length(xi) >= min_n &&
        n_distinct(xi, na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        n_distinct(xj, na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        sd(xi, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 &&
        sd(xj, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
      ) {
        p_ij <- tryCatch(
          suppressWarnings(
            cor.test(
              xi,
              xj,
              method = method,
              exact = FALSE
            )$p.value
          ),
          error = function(e) NA_real_
        )

        p[i, j] <- p_ij
        p[j, i] <- p_ij
      }
    }
  }

  p
}

prep_p_for_corrplot <- function(P, M) {
  P_plot <- P

  P_plot[is.na(M)] <- NA
  P_plot[is.na(P_plot) & !is.na(M)] <- 1

  P_plot
}

zero_sd_vars <- corr_numeric %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      everything(),
      ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "sd"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.na(sd) | sd == 0)

if (nrow(zero_sd_vars) > 0) {
  print(zero_sd_vars)

  corr_numeric <- corr_numeric %>%
    select(-all_of(zero_sd_vars$variable))
}

# Короткие подписи для графика
diag_label_map <- setNames(
  paste0("dx_", str_remove(diag_vars, "^diag_bin_")),
  diag_vars
)

diag_label_fixed <- c(
  diag_bin_malignancy = "dx_malignancy",
  diag_bin_urinary_tract_infection = "dx_UTI",
  diag_bin_soft_tissue_infection = "dx_SSTI",
  diag_bin_meningitis = "dx_meningitis",
  diag_bin_burn_inhalation_injury = "dx_burn_inh",
  diag_bin_osteomyelitis = "dx_osteo",
  diag_bin_acute_pancreatitis = "dx_pancreatitis",
  diag_bin_peritonitis = "dx_peritonitis",
  diag_bin_pyelonephritis = "dx_pyelonephritis",
  diag_bin_pneumonia = "dx_pneumonia",
  diag_bin_post_major_surgery = "dx_surgery",
  diag_bin_trauma = "dx_trauma",
  diag_bin_cholangitis_biliary_infection = "dx_cholangitis",
  diag_bin_exogenous_intoxication = "dx_intox",
  diag_bin_endocarditis = "dx_endocarditis",
  diag_bin_other = "dx_other"
)

for (nm in intersect(names(diag_label_fixed), names(diag_label_map))) {
  diag_label_map[nm] <- diag_label_fixed[nm]
}

ind_label_map <- setNames(
  paste0("ind_", str_remove(ind_vars, "^ind_bin_")),
  ind_vars
)

ind_label_fixed <- c(
  ind_bin_bacteremia = "ind_bacteremia",
  ind_bin_rhabdomyolysis = "ind_rhabdo",
  ind_bin_sepsis = "ind_sepsis",
  ind_bin_ischemia_reperfusion_injury = "ind_I_R",
  ind_bin_septic_shock = "ind_shock",
  ind_bin_massive_tissue_necrosis = "ind_necrosis",
  ind_bin_capillary_leak_syndrome = "ind_cap_leak",
  ind_bin_acute_liver_failure = "ind_ALF",
  ind_bin_multiorgan_failure = "ind_MOF",
  ind_bin_acute_kidney_injury = "ind_AKI",
  ind_bin_elevated_lactate = "ind_lactate",
  ind_bin_systemic_inflammatory_response = "ind_SIRS",
  ind_bin_elevated_inflammatory_markers = "ind_infl_markers",
  ind_bin_endogenous_intoxication = "ind_endotox",
  ind_bin_other = "ind_other"
)

for (nm in intersect(names(ind_label_fixed), names(ind_label_map))) {
  ind_label_map[nm] <- ind_label_fixed[nm]
}

corr_label_map <- c(
  # антроподемография
  age_yr = "Age",
  sex_male_bin = "Male",
  BMI = "BMI",
  charlson_index = "Charlson",
  ICU_6_month_history_bin = "ICU_6m",

  # клиника T0
  SOFA = "SOFA",
  VIS2020_0_excl = "VIS",
  PaFiO2_calc = "PF_ratio",
  PaFiO2 = "PaFiO2",
  SpFiO2 = "SpFiO2",
  avg_BP = "avg_BP",
  vasopressors_if_used_bin = "Vaso",
  RRT_if_used_bin = "RRT",
  MV_if_used_bin = "MV",
  ECMO_if_used_bin = "ECMO",
  from_other_ICU_transfer_bin = "Transfer",
  is_septic_bin = "septic",
  vasopressors_dur_hours = "Vaso_dur_h",
  RRT_dur_hours = "RRT_dur_h",
  MV_dur_hours = "MV_dur_h",
  ECMO_dur_hours = "ECMO_dur_h",

  # посевы
  culture_gram_plus_bin = "cult_Gram_plus",
  culture_gram_minus_bin = "cult_Gram_minus",
  culture_bacteremia_bin = "cult_bacteremia",
  culture_fungal_bin = "cult_fungal",

  # лабораторка T0
  lactate = "lactate",
  creatinine = "creatinine",
  albumin = "albumin",
  C_react_protein = "CRP",
  procalcitonin = "PCT",
  D_dimer = "D_dimer",
  fibrinogen = "fibrinogen",
  leucocytes = "WBC",
  lymphocytes = "LYM",
  neutrophils = "NEU",
  NLR = "NLR",
  thrombocytes = "PLT",
  bilirubin_total = "bilirubin",

  # сорбция
  icu_to_HA1_hours = "ICU_to_HA_h",
  HA_duration = "HA_duration",
  HA_avg_blood_flow = "blood_flow",
  first_sorption_LPS = "first_LPS",
  is_lps_72h = "LPS_72h",
  HA_anticoag_citrate = "AC_citrate",
  HA_anticoag_heparin = "AC_heparin",
  HA_anticoag_none = "AC_none",
  HA_anticoag_other = "AC_other",
  HA_other_methods_bin = "other_ECM",
  HA_adverse_effects_bin = "AE_HA",
  HA_efficency_CGI_E = "CGI_E",

  # динамика 0–48
  delta_SOFA = "dSOFA",
  delta_VIS2020 = "dVIS",
  delta_PLT = "dPLT",
  delta_LYM = "dLYM",
  delta_NEU = "dNEU",
  delta_NLR = "dNLR",
  delta_Crea = "dCrea",
  delta_CRP = "dCRP",
  delta_bilirubin = "dBili",

  # исходы
  outcome_days = "outcome_days",
  outcome_dead_bin = "death",
  outcome_propensity = "outcome_score",

  diag_label_map,
  ind_label_map
)

corr_numeric_plot <- corr_numeric

new_names <- names(corr_numeric_plot)
new_names <- ifelse(
  new_names %in% names(corr_label_map),
  corr_label_map[new_names],
  new_names
)

names(corr_numeric_plot) <- make.unique(unname(new_names), sep = "_")

# Расчет корреляций и p-value
M <- cor_matrix_safe(
  corr_numeric_plot,
  method = "spearman",
  min_n = min_pair_n
)

P <- cor_pmat(
  corr_numeric_plot,
  method = "spearman",
  min_n = min_pair_n
)

# Ручной порядок блоков
order_block_hclust <- function(vars, M) {
  vars <- intersect(vars, colnames(M))

  if (length(vars) <= 2) return(vars)

  M_block <- M[vars, vars, drop = FALSE]
  M_block[is.na(M_block)] <- 0
  diag(M_block) <- 1

  vars[corrplot::corrMatOrder(
    abs(M_block),
    order = "hclust",
    hclust.method = "ward.D2"
  )]
}

block_vars <- list(
  demo = c(
    "Age",
    "Male",
    "BMI",
    "Charlson",
    "ICU_6m"
  ),

  clinical = c(
    "SOFA",
    "VIS",
    "PF_ratio",
    "PaFiO2",
    "SpFiO2",
    "avg_BP",
    "Vaso",
    "RRT",
    "MV",
    "ECMO",
    "Transfer",
    "septic",
    "Vaso_dur_h",
    "RRT_dur_h",
    "MV_dur_h",
    "ECMO_dur_h"
  ),

  cultures = c(
    "cult_Gram_plus",
    "cult_Gram_minus",
    "cult_bacteremia",
    "cult_fungal"
  ),

  diagnoses = unname(diag_label_map),
  indications = unname(ind_label_map),

  labs = c(
    "lactate",
    "creatinine",
    "albumin",
    "CRP",
    "PCT",
    "D_dimer",
    "fibrinogen",
    "WBC",
    "LYM",
    "NEU",
    "NLR",
    "PLT",
    "bilirubin"
  ),

  sorption = c(
    "ICU_to_HA_h",
    "HA_duration",
    "blood_flow",
    "first_LPS",
    "LPS_72h",
    "AC_citrate",
    "AC_heparin",
    "AC_none",
    "AC_other",
    "other_ECM",
    "AE_HA",
    "CGI_E"
  ),

  dynamics = c(
    "dSOFA",
    "dVIS",
    "dPLT",
    "dLYM",
    "dNEU",
    "dNLR",
    "dCrea",
    "dCRP",
    "dBili"
  ),

  outcomes = c(
    "outcome_days",
    "death",
    "outcome_score"
  )
)

block_order <- unlist(
  lapply(block_vars, order_block_hclust, M = M),
  use.names = FALSE
)

other_vars <- setdiff(colnames(M), block_order)
final_order <- c(block_order, other_vars)

M_manual <- M[final_order, final_order]
P_manual <- P[final_order, final_order]

M_for_order <- M
M_for_order[is.na(M_for_order)] <- 0
diag(M_for_order) <- 1

hclust_order <- corrplot::corrMatOrder(
  abs(M_for_order),
  order = "hclust",
  hclust.method = "ward.D2"
)

M_hclust <- M[hclust_order, hclust_order]
P_hclust <- P[hclust_order, hclust_order]

P_manual_plot <- prep_p_for_corrplot(P_manual, M_manual)
P_hclust_plot <- prep_p_for_corrplot(P_hclust, M_hclust)

col_pal <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(200)

# функция

plot_corr_full <- function(M_plot, P_plot, title = NULL, tl_cex = 0.45, pch_cex = 0.45) {
  par(mar = c(1, 1, 4, 2))

  corrplot(
    M_plot,
    method = "color",
    type = "full",
    diag = TRUE,
    order = "original",

    col = col_pal,
    cl.lim = c(-1, 1),

    tl.pos = "lt",
    tl.col = "brown4",
    tl.cex = tl_cex,
    tl.srt = 90,

    addgrid.col = "grey85",
    na.label = " ",

    p.mat = P_plot,
    sig.level = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.05),
    insig = "label_sig",
    pch.col = "black",
    pch.cex = pch_cex,

    title = title,
    mar = c(0, 0, 2, 0)
  )
}

```

## HTML

```{r}

#| label: corr_spearman_expanded_blocked
#| fig-width: 24
#| fig-height: 24
#| message: false
#| warning: false

plot_corr_full(
  M_manual,
  P_manual_plot,
  title = "Spearman correlation matrix, expanded, block order",
  tl_cex = 0.42,
  pch_cex = 0.42
)

```

## Автоматический hclust

```{r}

#| label: corr_spearman_expanded_hclust
#| fig-width: 24
#| fig-height: 24
#| message: false
#| warning: false

plot_corr_full(
  M_hclust,
  P_hclust_plot,
  title = "Spearman correlation matrix, expanded, hclust order",
  tl_cex = 0.42,
  pch_cex = 0.42
)

```

## Сохранение

```{r}

corr_width  <- max(18, 0.28 * ncol(M_manual))
corr_height <- max(18, 0.28 * ncol(M_manual))

dir.create(GRAPHES_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

svg(
  filename = file.path(GRAPHES_DIR, "corr_spearman_expanded.svg"),
  width = corr_width,
  height = corr_height
)

plot_corr_full(
  M_hclust,
  P_hclust_plot,
  title = "Spearman correlation matrix, expanded",
  tl_cex = 0.7,
  pch_cex = 0.42
)

dev.off()

pdf(
  file = file.path(GRAPHES_DIR, "corr_spearman_expanded.pdf"),
  width = corr_width,
  height = corr_height,
  useDingbats = FALSE
)

plot_corr_full(
  M_hclust,
  P_hclust_plot,
  title = "Spearman correlation matrix, expanded",
  tl_cex = 0.7,
  pch_cex = 0.42
)

dev.off()

```

## Частные корреляции с исключением корреляции с SOFA

```{r}

#| label: corr_spearman_SOFA_adj
#| message: false
#| warning: false
 
# Partial Spearman correlation adjusted for SOFA -------------------------

partial_spearman_matrix_safe <- function(x, control_var = "SOFA", min_n = 5) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x)

  if (!control_var %in% names(x)) {
    stop("Не найдена переменная для поправки: ", control_var)
  }

  vars <- setdiff(names(x), control_var)
  k <- 1

  r <- matrix(
    NA_real_,
    nrow = length(vars),
    ncol = length(vars),
    dimnames = list(vars, vars)
  )

  p <- matrix(
    NA_real_,
    nrow = length(vars),
    ncol = length(vars),
    dimnames = list(vars, vars)
  )

  diag(r) <- 1
  diag(p) <- 0

  if (length(vars) < 2) {
    return(list(r = r, p = p))
  }

  for (i in seq_len(length(vars) - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):length(vars)) {
      v1 <- vars[i]
      v2 <- vars[j]

      dat <- x[, c(v1, v2, control_var)]
      dat <- dat[complete.cases(dat), , drop = FALSE]

      if (
        nrow(dat) >= min_n &&
        n_distinct(dat[[v1]], na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        n_distinct(dat[[v2]], na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        n_distinct(dat[[control_var]], na.rm = TRUE) > 1 &&
        sd(dat[[v1]], na.rm = TRUE) > 0 &&
        sd(dat[[v2]], na.rm = TRUE) > 0 &&
        sd(dat[[control_var]], na.rm = TRUE) > 0
      ) {
        dat_rank <- dat %>%
          mutate(
            across(
              everything(),
              ~ rank(.x, ties.method = "average", na.last = "keep")
            )
          )

        fit1 <- lm(dat_rank[[v1]] ~ dat_rank[[control_var]])
        fit2 <- lm(dat_rank[[v2]] ~ dat_rank[[control_var]])

        res1 <- residuals(fit1)
        res2 <- residuals(fit2)

        r_ij <- suppressWarnings(
          cor(
            res1,
            res2,
            method = "pearson",
            use = "complete.obs"
          )
        )

        if (is.finite(r_ij)) {
          r_ij <- max(min(r_ij, 0.999999), -0.999999)

          df <- nrow(dat_rank) - k - 2

          p_ij <- if (df > 0) {
            t_ij <- r_ij * sqrt(df / (1 - r_ij^2))
            2 * pt(abs(t_ij), df = df, lower.tail = FALSE)
          } else {
            NA_real_
          }

          r[i, j] <- r_ij
          r[j, i] <- r_ij

          p[i, j] <- p_ij
          p[j, i] <- p_ij
        }
      }
    }
  }

  list(r = r, p = p)
}

partial_sofa <- partial_spearman_matrix_safe(
  corr_numeric_plot,
  control_var = "SOFA",
  min_n = min_pair_n
)

M_partial_SOFA <- partial_sofa$r
P_partial_SOFA <- partial_sofa$p

# Совмещенная матрица: низ — обычные корреляции, верх — частные

control_var <- "SOFA"

combo_order <- final_order[
  final_order %in% colnames(M)
]

# Обычные корреляции: полный порядок, включая SOFA
M_raw_combo <- M[combo_order, combo_order]
P_raw_combo <- P[combo_order, combo_order]

# Начинаем с обычной матрицы, но верхний треугольник временно очищаем
M_combo_SOFA <- M_raw_combo
P_combo_SOFA <- P_raw_combo

M_combo_SOFA[upper.tri(M_combo_SOFA)] <- NA
P_combo_SOFA[upper.tri(P_combo_SOFA)] <- NA

# Частные корреляции существуют только для переменных НЕ SOFA
partial_vars <- setdiff(combo_order, control_var)
partial_vars <- partial_vars[
  partial_vars %in% colnames(M_partial_SOFA)
]

M_partial_combo <- M_partial_SOFA[partial_vars, partial_vars]
P_partial_combo <- P_partial_SOFA[partial_vars, partial_vars]

# Заполняем верхний треугольник частными корреляциями,
# но только для пар без SOFA
if (length(partial_vars) >= 2) {
  for (i in seq_len(length(partial_vars) - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):length(partial_vars)) {
      v1 <- partial_vars[i]
      v2 <- partial_vars[j]

      M_combo_SOFA[v1, v2] <- M_partial_combo[v1, v2]
      P_combo_SOFA[v1, v2] <- P_partial_combo[v1, v2]
    }
  }
}

diag(M_combo_SOFA) <- 1
diag(P_combo_SOFA) <- 0

P_combo_SOFA_plot <- prep_p_for_corrplot(P_combo_SOFA, M_combo_SOFA)

# График

plot_corr_full(
  M_combo_SOFA,
  P_combo_SOFA_plot,
  title = "Lower triangle: ordinary Spearman; upper triangle: partial Spearman adjusted for SOFA",
  tl_cex = 0.7,
  pch_cex = 0.5
)

# Сохранение в вектор

corr_width  <- max(20, 0.30 * ncol(M_combo_SOFA))
corr_height <- max(20, 0.30 * ncol(M_combo_SOFA))

svg(
  filename = file.path(GRAPHES_DIR, "corr_spearman_combo_partial_SOFA.svg"),
  width = corr_width,
  height = corr_height
)

plot_corr_full(
  M_combo_SOFA,
  P_combo_SOFA_plot,
  title = "Lower triangle: ordinary Spearman; upper triangle: partial Spearman adjusted for SOFA",
  tl_cex = 0.7,
  pch_cex = 0.5
)

dev.off()

pdf(
  file = file.path(GRAPHES_DIR, "corr_spearman_combo_partial_SOFA.pdf"),
  width = corr_width,
  height = corr_height,
  useDingbats = FALSE
)

plot_corr_full(
  M_combo_SOFA,
  P_combo_SOFA_plot,
  title = "Lower triangle: ordinary Spearman; upper triangle: partial Spearman adjusted for SOFA",
  tl_cex = 0.7,
  pch_cex = 0.5
)

dev.off()
```

# Проверка PaFiO2 и фибриноген

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

dbg <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint == "m12h_0h") %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  transmute(
    pat_record_id,
    PaFiO2 = readr::parse_number(as.character(PaFiO2), locale = locale(decimal_mark = ",")),
    fibrinogen = readr::parse_number(as.character(fibrinogen), locale = locale(decimal_mark = ","))
  )

# 1) Сколько реально пар попало в расчёт
dbg2 <- dbg %>% filter(!is.na(PaFiO2), !is.na(fibrinogen))
n_pair <- nrow(dbg2)
cat("n_pair =", n_pair, "\n")

dbg2 %>% arrange(PaFiO2) %>% print(n = Inf)

# 2) Сколько уникальных значений (ties)
cat("unique PaFiO2 =", n_distinct(dbg2$PaFiO2), "\n")
cat("unique fibrinogen =", n_distinct(dbg2$fibrinogen), "\n")

# 3) Посмотреть сами пары (лучше сразу видно, почему τ=1)
print(dbg2 %>% arrange(PaFiO2))

# 4) Пересчитать тестом (он покажет оценку и p-value, и использованное n)
# print(cor.test(dbg2$PaFiO2, dbg2$fibrinogen, method = "kendall", exact = # FALSE))

# 5) Визуальная проверка
ggplot(dbg2, aes(PaFiO2, fibrinogen)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()

# tmp <- patients_tidy %>%
#   filter(timepoint == "m12h_0h") %>%
#   distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
#   transmute(
#     pat_record_id,
#     PaFiO2_raw = PaFiO2,
#     fibrinogen_raw = fibrinogen,
#     PaFiO2_num = readr::parse_number(as.character(PaFiO2_raw), locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = ",")),
#     fibrinogen_num = readr::parse_number(as.character(fibrinogen_raw), locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = ","))
#   )
# 
# cat("PaFiO2 non-NA raw:", sum(!is.na(tmp$PaFiO2_raw)), " numeric:", sum(!is.na(tmp$PaFiO2_num)), "\n")
# cat("fibrinogen non-NA raw:", sum(!is.na(tmp$fibrinogen_raw)), " numeric:", sum(!is.na(tmp$fibrinogen_num)), "\n")
# 
# tmp %>% filter(is.na(PaFiO2_num) & !is.na(PaFiO2_raw)) %>% head(20)
# tmp %>% filter(is.na(fibrinogen_num) & !is.na(fibrinogen_raw)) %>% head(20)
```

# VIS gtsummary

```{r}
#| label: gtsummary_vis
#| echo: true

# Отдельная компактная таблица только для VIS.
# Нужна, чтобы быстро показать оба варианта показателя:
# исходный VIS2020 и аналитический VIS2020_0_excl.
# Все переменные уже рассчитаны в ETL и лежат в patients_tidy:
#   VIS2020        — «сырой» VIS
#   VIS2020_0_excl — VIS для анализа (исключены пациенты с 0/NA на m12h_0h)

vis_df <- patients_tidy %>%
  select(timepoint, any_of(c("VIS2020", "VIS2020_0_excl")))

tbl_vis <- vis_df %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = timepoint,
    type = list(all_continuous() ~ "continuous"),
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})"),
    label = list(
      VIS2020 ~ "VIS2020",
      VIS2020_0_excl ~ "VIS2020_0_excl"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  )

tbl_vis
```

# Logit A

```{r}

#| label: logit A
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

# Для логистической регрессии используем только baseline-строки
# и только тех пациентов, у кого исход можно интерпретировать как бинарный.
# Это защищает модель от смешивания разных клинических статусов.
df_base <- pt_top %>%
  filter(!is.na(outcome_logit))

# =========================================================
# Logit A: + first_sorption_type (factor)
# =========================================================
df_logit_type <- df_base %>%
  mutate(
    first_sorption_type = factor(first_sorption_type, levels = c("CT", "LPS"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(first_sorption_type)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(icu_to_HA1_hours), !is.na(SOFA), !is.na(age_yr)) %>%
  filter(icu_to_HA1_hours > 0, icu_to_HA1_hours < 240)

model_logit_type <- glm(
  outcome_logit ~ age_yr + first_sorption_type + SOFA * I(icu_to_HA1_hours / 5),
  data = df_logit_type,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

tbl_regression(
  model_logit_type,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  label = list(
    `I(icu_to_HA1_hours/5)` ~ "Время между поступлением в ОРИТ и началом ГС (на 5 ч)",
    SOFA ~ "SOFA",
    `SOFA:I(icu_to_HA1_hours/5)` ~ "Взаимодействие: SOFA × время до начала ГС",
    age_yr ~ "Возраст (полных лет)",
    first_sorption_type ~ "Тип первой сорбции (Гемоперфузия 1)"
  )
) %>%
  bold_labels()

# Прогноз вероятности смерти 
type_ref <- names(sort(table(df_logit_type$first_sorption_type), decreasing = TRUE))[1]

p_type <- tibble(
  icu_to_HA1_hours = c(0, 1, 3, 5),
  SOFA = median(df_logit_type$SOFA, na.rm = TRUE),
  age_yr = median(df_logit_type$age_yr, na.rm = TRUE),
  first_sorption_type = factor(type_ref, levels = levels(df_logit_type$first_sorption_type))
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_death = predict(model_logit_type, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    p_not_death = 1 - p_death
  )

p_type
summary(model_logit_type)




```

# Logit B

```{r}

#| label: logit B
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

# Для логистической регрессии используем только baseline-строки
# и только тех пациентов, у кого исход можно интерпретировать как бинарный.
# Это защищает модель от смешивания разных клинических статусов.
df_base <- pt_top %>%
  filter(!is.na(outcome_logit))

# =========================================================
# Logit B: + ICU_to_first_LPS (continuous, на 5 часов)
# =========================================================
df_logit_lps <- df_base %>%
  filter(!is.na(ICU_to_first_LPS)) %>%                 # если вдруг есть NA — чтобы не терять строки "молча"
  filter(!is.na(icu_to_HA1_hours), !is.na(SOFA), !is.na(age_yr))

model_logit_lps <- glm(
  outcome_logit ~ SOFA + age_yr + I(ICU_to_first_LPS / 5),
  data = df_logit_lps,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

tbl_regression(
  model_logit_lps,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  label = list(
  
    SOFA ~ "SOFA",
    age_yr ~ "Возраст (полных лет)",
    `I(ICU_to_first_LPS/5)` ~ "Время от ICU до первого LPS (на 5 ч)"
  )
) %>%
  bold_labels()

# Прогноз вероятности смерти
p_lps <- tibble(
  icu_to_HA1_hours = c(0, 1, 3, 5),
  SOFA = median(df_logit_lps$SOFA, na.rm = TRUE),
  age_yr = median(df_logit_lps$age_yr, na.rm = TRUE),
  ICU_to_first_LPS = median(df_logit_lps$ICU_to_first_LPS, na.rm = TRUE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_death = predict(model_logit_lps, newdata = ., type = "response"),
    p_not_death = 1 - p_death
  )

p_lps
summary(model_logit_lps)
```

# Сорбции gtsummary

```{r}

#| label: ha_gtsummary_compact
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

# Небольшая вспомогательная функция:
# если x не пустой и не NA, возвращаем x, иначе y.
`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (!is.null(x) && length(x) && !is.na(x) && as.character(x) != "") x else y
}

sq <- function(x) str_squish(as.character(x))
norm0 <- function(x){
  x <- str_to_lower(sq(x))
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00A0", " ")
  str_squish(x)
}

# используем dict_ha, который уже создан в ETL (без повторного read_excel)
ha_label_map <- tibble::deframe(dict_ha)  # names = short, values = ru
label_list <- rlang::set_names(as.list(ha_label_map), names(ha_label_map))

# Готовим таблицу процедур для summary:
# нормализуем антикоагуляцию, определяем наличие ЗПТ и делаем бинарный признак
# "нежелательные явления указаны / не указаны".
ha_proc <- HA_tidy %>%
  mutate(
    HA_anticoagulation_cat = case_when(
      HA_anticoagulation == "Цитрат"  ~ "Цитрат",
      HA_anticoagulation == "Гепарин" ~ "Гепарин",
      HA_anticoagulation == "Другой" &
        norm0(coalesce(HA_anticoagulation_other, "")) %in% c("без антикоагуляции") ~ "Без антикоагуляции",
      HA_anticoagulation == "Другой" ~ "Другой",
      TRUE ~ "Другой"
    ),

    other_norm = norm0(coalesce(HA_other_methods, "")),
    has_rrt  = str_detect(other_norm, "гемодиафильтрац|гемодиализ|гемофильтрац"),

    rrt_grp = if_else(has_rrt, "В комбинации с ЗПТ", "Изолированная гемосорбция") %>%
      factor(levels = c("В комбинации с ЗПТ", "Изолированная гемосорбция")),

    adverse_effects_filled = if_else({
      x <- norm0(HA_adverse_effects)
      !(is.na(x) | x %in% c("", "нет", "не было", "-", "—"))
    }, "Да", "Нет")
  ) %>%
  select(-other_norm, -has_rrt)

ha_tbl_data <- ha_proc %>%
  select(
    rrt_grp,
    HA_cartrige_type,
    HA_duration,
    HA_avg_blood_flow,
    HA_anticoagulation_cat,
    adverse_effects_filled
  )

# N в шапке столбцов (как в gtsummary_pat)
n_all <- nrow(ha_tbl_data)
n_rrt <- sum(ha_tbl_data$rrt_grp == "В комбинации с ЗПТ", na.rm = TRUE)
n_iso <- sum(ha_tbl_data$rrt_grp == "Изолированная гемосорбция", na.rm = TRUE)

tbl <- ha_tbl_data %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = rrt_grp,
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})"
    ),
    missing = "no",
    sort = all_categorical() ~ "frequency",
    label = c(
      label_list,
      list(
        HA_anticoagulation_cat = ha_label_map[["HA_anticoagulation"]] %||% "Антикоагуляция",
        adverse_effects_filled = "Нежелательные явления: указано"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  add_overall(last = FALSE) %>%
  modify_header(
    label ~ "**Параметр**",
    stat_0 ~ paste0("**All (N=", n_all, ")**"),
    stat_1 ~ paste0("**В комбинации с ЗПТ (N=", n_rrt, ")**"),
    stat_2 ~ paste0("**Изолированная гемосорбция (N=", n_iso, ")**")
  ) %>%
  modify_caption("**Сводная таблица по сорбциям**") %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_ha_gtsummary_compact <- tbl

tbl_ha_gtsummary_compact
```

# Проверка дат по точкам

```{r}
#| label: check_clin_assess_vs_first_sorption
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)

check_clin_assess_dates <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c("m12h_0h", "48h_72h")) %>%
  select(
    pat_record_id,
    timepoint,
    clin_assess_dt,
    first_sorption_dt,
    SOFA
  ) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = timepoint,
    values_from = c(clin_assess_dt, SOFA),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{timepoint}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff_m12_vs_first_sorp_hours = as.numeric(
      difftime(clin_assess_dt_m12h_0h, first_sorption_dt, units = "hours")
    ),
    diff_48h_vs_m12_hours = as.numeric(
      difftime(clin_assess_dt_48h_72h, clin_assess_dt_m12h_0h, units = "hours")
    ),
    diff_m12_vs_first_sorp_days = diff_m12_vs_first_sorp_hours / 24,
    diff_48h_vs_m12_days        = diff_48h_vs_m12_hours / 24
  ) %>%
  select(
    pat_record_id,
    first_sorption_dt,
    clin_assess_dt_m12h_0h,
    SOFA_m12h_0h,
    diff_m12_vs_first_sorp_hours,
    diff_m12_vs_first_sorp_days,
    clin_assess_dt_48h_72h,
    SOFA_48h_72h,
    diff_48h_vs_m12_hours,
    diff_48h_vs_m12_days
  ) %>%
  arrange(pat_record_id)

# вывод таблицы в документ
check_clin_assess_dates

# сохранение в Excel
openxlsx::write.xlsx(
  check_clin_assess_dates,
  file = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "check_clin_assess_dates.xlsx"),
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

# ВЫБОРКА: ВРЕМЕННЫЕ ТОЧКИ ПО СОРБЦИИ

```{r}

#| label: analysis_population_by_clin_assess_order
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

library(dplyr)

# Порядок новых аналитических точек
tp_keep <- c("m12h_0h", "48h_72h")

# Создаем новый датасет, не меняя patients_tidy:
# - m12h_0h = последняя клиническая оценка до или ровно в момент first_sorption_dt
# - 48h_72h = первая клиническая оценка строго после first_sorption_dt

patients_before <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(!is.na(first_sorption_dt), !is.na(clin_assess_dt)) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(clin_assess_dt <= first_sorption_dt) %>%
  slice_max(clin_assess_dt, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint_old = as.character(timepoint),
    timepoint = factor("m12h_0h", levels = tp_keep, ordered = TRUE),
    clin_to_first_h = round(as.numeric(difftime(clin_assess_dt, first_sorption_dt, units = "hours")), 1),
    selection_rule = "last clin_assess_dt <= first_sorption_dt"
  )

patients_after <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(!is.na(first_sorption_dt), !is.na(clin_assess_dt)) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(clin_assess_dt > first_sorption_dt) %>%
  slice_min(clin_assess_dt, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint_old = as.character(timepoint),
    timepoint = factor("48h_72h", levels = tp_keep, ordered = TRUE),
    clin_to_first_h = round(as.numeric(difftime(clin_assess_dt, first_sorption_dt, units = "hours")), 1),
    selection_rule = "first clin_assess_dt > first_sorption_dt"
  )

# Объединяем обе выбранные строки в один датасет, считаем разницу дат клин. оценок
# пересчёт VIS2020_0_excl
patients_analysis_clin_window <- bind_rows(patients_before, patients_after) %>%
  arrange(pat_record_id, timepoint) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  mutate(
    VIS2020_m12_new = dplyr::first(VIS2020[timepoint == "m12h_0h"]),
    VIS2020_0_excl = dplyr::if_else(
      is.na(VIS2020_m12_new) | VIS2020_m12_new <= 0,
      NA_real_,
      as.numeric(VIS2020)
    )
  ) %>%
    mutate(
    clin_assess_dt_m12h_0h = dplyr::first(clin_assess_dt[timepoint == "m12h_0h"]),
    clin_assess_dt_48h_72h = dplyr::first(clin_assess_dt[timepoint == "48h_72h"]),
    clin_assess_diff_h = as.numeric(
      difftime(clin_assess_dt_48h_72h, clin_assess_dt_m12h_0h, units = "hours")
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-VIS2020_m12_new)

# Короткая проверка: сколько строк получилось по новым точкам
patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  count(timepoint, name = "n_rows")

# сохранение в Excel
openxlsx::write.xlsx(
  patients_analysis_clin_window,
  file = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "patients_analysis_clin_window.xlsx"),
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

# Парные сравнения (-12-0) - (48-72)ч

## Wilcox по выборке (только LPS)

```{r}

#| label: paired_test_m12h_0h_48h_72h
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(tibble)
library(broom)

# Предполагается, что выше уже создан patients_analysis_clin_window
tp_keep <- c("m12h_0h", "48h_72h")

# Переменные для анализа
vars <- c(
  "SOFA","PaFiO2_calc","lactate","creatinine","albumin","C_react_protein",
  "procalcitonin","D_dimer","fibrinogen","leucocytes","lymphocytes",
  "neutrophils","NLR","thrombocytes","VIS2020", "VIS2020_0_excl"
)
vars <- intersect(vars, names(patients_analysis_clin_window))

# Берем только LPS и только реальные пары
patients_paired <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  filter(first_sorption_type == "LPS") %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, clin_assess_dt, any_of(vars)) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(timepoint) == 2) %>%
  ungroup()

# Средняя разница clin_assess_dt между точками m12h_0h и 48h_72h
mean_clin_assess_diff_h <- patients_paired %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, clin_assess_dt) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = timepoint,
    values_from = clin_assess_dt
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    clin_assess_diff_h = as.numeric(
      difftime(`48h_72h`, m12h_0h, units = "hours")
    )
  ) %>%
  summarise(mean_clin_assess_diff_h = mean(clin_assess_diff_h, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(mean_clin_assess_diff_h)

mean_clin_assess_diff_h_txt <- ifelse(
  is.na(mean_clin_assess_diff_h),
  "NA",
  sprintf("%.1f", mean_clin_assess_diff_h)
)

# Парный Wilcoxon: разность интерпретируем как 48h_72h - m12h_0h
paired_wilcox_48_minus_0 <- function(data, variable, by, group, conf.level = 0.95, ...) {
  df <- data %>%
    select(all_of(c(group, by, variable))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[group]]),
      !is.na(.data[[by]])
    ) %>%
    distinct(.data[[group]], .data[[by]], .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = all_of(group),
      names_from = all_of(by),
      values_from = all_of(variable)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[["m12h_0h"]]) & !is.na(.data[["48h_72h"]]))

  if (nrow(df) < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        estimate = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_,
        conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }

  wt <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(
      stats::wilcox.test(
        x = df[["48h_72h"]],
        y = df[["m12h_0h"]],
        paired = TRUE,
        conf.int = TRUE,
        conf.level = conf.level,
        exact = FALSE
      )
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(wt)) {
    return(
      tibble(
        estimate = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_,
        conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }

  broom::tidy(wt) %>%
    transmute(
      estimate = .data$estimate,
      conf.low = .data$conf.low,
      conf.high = .data$conf.high,
      p.value = .data$p.value
    )
}

tbl <-
  patients_paired %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = timepoint,
    include = -c(pat_record_id, clin_assess_dt),
    statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_difference(
    test  = all_continuous() ~ paired_wilcox_48_minus_0,
    group = pat_record_id
  ) %>%
  modify_fmt_fun(
    estimate ~ function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), NA_character_, sprintf("%+.2f", x))
  ) %>%
  modify_header(estimate ~ "**Difference**") %>%
  modify_footnote(
    estimate ~ paste0(
      "Paired Wilcoxon estimate for -12-0h и 48-72h ",
      "Средняя разница между клиническими оценками в точках -12-0 ч и 48-72 
      ч: ",
      mean_clin_assess_diff_h_txt, " ч"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_caption("Парные сравнения -12-0 и 48-72 часов (только LPS)") %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl

# PowerPoint
tbl %>%
  as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::save_as_pptx(path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "paired_test.pptx"))
```

## SOFA Scatter по выборке

```{r}

#| label: scatter_SOFA_m12h_0h_vs_48h_72h
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 6

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

sofa_scatter <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, SOFA, clin_assess_dt, ICU_in_dt) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = timepoint,
    values_from = c(SOFA, clin_assess_dt),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{timepoint}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hours_from_icu_to_clin_m12 = as.numeric(
      difftime(clin_assess_dt_m12h_0h, ICU_in_dt, units = "hours")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(SOFA_m12h_0h),
    !is.na(SOFA_48h_72h),
    !is.na(hours_from_icu_to_clin_m12)
  )

n_points <- nrow(sofa_scatter)

lims <- range(
  c(sofa_scatter$SOFA_m12h_0h, sofa_scatter$SOFA_48h_72h),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

ggplot(
  sofa_scatter,
  aes(
    x = SOFA_m12h_0h,
    y = SOFA_48h_72h
  )
) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = hours_from_icu_to_clin_m12),
    width = 0.15,
    height = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.8,
    size = 2
  ) +
  geom_smooth(se = TRUE) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(floor(lims[1]), ceiling(lims[2]), by = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(floor(lims[1]), ceiling(lims[2]), by = 1)
  ) +
  coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf, y = -Inf,
    label = paste0("n = ", n_points),
    hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.8,
    size = 4
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "SOFA, -12–0 часов",
    y = "SOFA, 48–72 часа",
    color = "Часы от ICU_in_dt\nдо clin_assess_dt\nв точке -12–0 ч"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

```

# Графики

```{r}

#| label: plots_m12h_0h_48h_72h
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

# Ниже строим отдельный график для каждой переменной:
# коробка с квартилями + индивидуальные линии пациента + p-value парного теста.

# Ожидается, что vars, tp_keep и patients_paired уже существуют

# ---- подписи timepoint для оси X ----
tp_labels <- c(
  m12h_0h  = "-12-0 часов",
  `48h_72h` = "48-72 часа"
)

# ---- short -> ru из словаря ----
var_label_map <- dict_pat %>%
  distinct(short, ru) %>%
  filter(!is.na(short), short != "", !is.na(ru), ru != "") %>%
  { setNames(.$ru, .$short) }

lab_var <- function(v) {
  v <- as.character(v)
  lbl <- unname(var_label_map[v])  
  if (is.na(lbl) || lbl == "") v else lbl
}

# ---- переменные ----
vars_plot <- vars

# Логарифмируем ось Y только для выбранных переменных
vars_log_Y <- c("lactate", "D_dimer", "lymphocytes", "procalcitonin", "NLR", "VIS2020_0_excl")

plot_long <- patients_paired %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, any_of(vars_plot)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(pat_record_id, timepoint),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_keep),
    variable  = factor(variable, levels = vars_plot),
    value     = as.numeric(value),
    # для лог-переменных убираем 0 и отрицательные (иначе log10 -> -Inf)
    value = if_else(as.character(variable) %in% vars_log_Y & !is.na(value) & value <= 0,
                    NA_real_, value)
  )

# оставляем только парные наблюдения по каждой переменной (2 timepoint и оба значения не NA)
plot_long_paired <- plot_long %>%
  group_by(variable, pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(
    n_distinct(timepoint) == 2,
    sum(!is.na(value)) == 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

q <- function(x, p) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_
  else as.numeric(quantile(x, p, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE))
}

# статистики считаем на парных значениях
stats_data <- plot_long_paired %>%
  group_by(variable, timepoint) %>%
  summarise(
    n   = sum(!is.na(value)),
    Me  = if (all(is.na(value))) NA_real_ else median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1  = q(value, 0.25),
    Q3  = q(value, 0.75),
    P05 = q(value, 0.05),
    P95 = q(value, 0.95),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

make_plot <- function(var_name) {
  df_stat <- stats_data %>% filter(variable == var_name)
  df_raw  <- plot_long_paired %>% filter(variable == var_name) %>% drop_na(value)

  df_line <- df_raw %>%
    group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
    filter(n_distinct(timepoint) == 2, n() == 2) %>%
    ungroup()

  # ---- p-value (paired t-test) ----
  w <- df_raw %>%
    select(pat_record_id, timepoint, value) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value)

  p_txt <- "paired t-test p = NA (too few pairs)"
  if (nrow(w) >= 2 &&
      all(tp_keep %in% names(w)) &&
      sum(!is.na(w[[tp_keep[1]]]) & !is.na(w[[tp_keep[2]]])) >= 2) {
    pval <- stats::t.test(w[[tp_keep[1]]], w[[tp_keep[2]]], paired = TRUE)$p.value
    p_txt <- paste0("paired t-test p = ", format.pval(pval, digits = 2, eps = 1e-3))
  }

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = df_stat,
      aes(
        x = timepoint,
        ymin = P05, ymax = P95,
        lower = Q1, middle = Me, upper = Q3,
        fill = timepoint
      ),
      stat = "identity",
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.55
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = df_line,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = value, group = pat_record_id),
      alpha = 0.25
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_raw,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = value),
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.008, height = 0),
      size = 0.9,
      alpha = 0.35
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = tp_labels) +
    labs(title = lab_var(var_name), subtitle = p_txt, x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  # Лог-шкала только для выбранных переменных
  if (as.character(var_name) %in% vars_log_Y) {
    p <- p + scale_y_log10(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))
  }

  p
}

plots_list <- vars_plot %>%
  set_names() %>%
  purrr::map(make_plot)

purrr::walk(plots_list, print)
```

## SOFA\>=4

```{r}

#| label: plot_SOFA_ge4_m12h_0h
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

tp_keep <- c("m12h_0h", "48h_72h")

tp_labels <- c(
  m12h_0h   = "-12-0 часов",
  `48h_72h` = "48-72 часа"
)

q <- function(x, p) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_
  else as.numeric(quantile(x, p, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE))
}

# 1) Берем только LPS и только реальные пары
# 2) Оставляем только пациентов с SOFA >= 4 в точке m12h_0h
sofa_ge4_df <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  filter(first_sorption_type == "LPS") %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, clin_assess_dt, SOFA) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% tp_keep) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(timepoint) == 2) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  mutate(
    SOFA_m12 = SOFA[match("m12h_0h", timepoint)]
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(SOFA_m12), SOFA_m12 >= 4)

# для графика требуем ненулевые/не-NA значения SOFA в обеих точках
sofa_ge4_plot <- sofa_ge4_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(SOFA)) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(timepoint) == 2, n() == 2) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_keep))

# статистики для boxplot
sofa_ge4_stat <- sofa_ge4_plot %>%
  group_by(timepoint) %>%
  summarise(
    n   = sum(!is.na(SOFA)),
    Me  = median(SOFA, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1  = q(SOFA, 0.25),
    Q3  = q(SOFA, 0.75),
    P05 = q(SOFA, 0.05),
    P95 = q(SOFA, 0.95),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# p-value парного t-test
sofa_ge4_wide <- sofa_ge4_plot %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, SOFA) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = SOFA)

n_pairs <- nrow(sofa_ge4_wide)

p_txt <- paste0("paired t-test p = NA (too few pairs), n = ", n_pairs)
if (n_pairs >= 2 &&
    all(tp_keep %in% names(sofa_ge4_wide)) &&
    sum(!is.na(sofa_ge4_wide[[tp_keep[1]]]) & !is.na(sofa_ge4_wide[[tp_keep[2]]])) >= 2) {
  pval <- stats::t.test(
    sofa_ge4_wide[[tp_keep[1]]],
    sofa_ge4_wide[[tp_keep[2]]],
    paired = TRUE
  )$p.value
  p_txt <- paste0(
    "paired t-test p = ",
    format.pval(pval, digits = 2, eps = 1e-3),
    ", n = ",
    n_pairs
  )
}

ggplot() +
  geom_boxplot(
    data = sofa_ge4_stat,
    aes(
      x = timepoint,
      ymin = P05, ymax = P95,
      lower = Q1, middle = Me, upper = Q3,
      fill = timepoint
    ),
    stat = "identity",
    outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = sofa_ge4_plot,
    aes(x = timepoint, y = SOFA, group = pat_record_id),
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sofa_ge4_plot,
    aes(x = timepoint, y = SOFA),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.008, height = 0),
    size = 0.9,
    alpha = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = tp_labels) +
  labs(
    title = "SOFA ≥ 4 в точке -12–0 часов",
    subtitle = p_txt,
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

# 1 Kaplan-Meier

```{r}

#| label: kaplan_meier_HA_24h
#| cache: false
#| echo: false

df_km <- patients_tidy %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(icu_to_HA1_hours),
    !is.na(ICU_in_dt),
    !is.na(ICU_out_or_death_dt),
    !is.na(outcome)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    time_days = as.numeric(ICU_out_or_death_dt - ICU_in_dt, units = "days"),
    event = if_else(outcome == "Умер", 1, 0),
    early_start = if_else(icu_to_HA1_hours < 24, "Раннее (<24ч)", "Позднее (≥24ч)")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_days), time_days >= 0)

# 30-дневное административное цензурирование
df_km_30 <- df_km %>%
  mutate(
    time_30 = pmin(time_days, 30),
    event_30 = if_else(time_days <= 30 & event == 1, 1, 0)
  )

fit_30 <- survfit(Surv(time_30, event_30) ~ early_start, data = df_km_30)

plot(
  fit_30,
  col = 1:2,
  lwd = 2,
  xlab = "Дни с момента поступления в ОРИТ",
  ylab = "Вероятность выживания",
  main = "30-дневная выживаемость: раннее vs позднее начало ГС",
  xlim = c(0, 30)
)

legend(
  "bottomleft",
  legend = levels(factor(df_km_30$early_start)),
  col = 1:2,
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)

survdiff(Surv(time_30, event_30) ~ early_start, data = df_km_30)

```

# 2 Kaplan-Meier 24h Landmark Analysis

```{r}

#| label: landmark_28d_24h_risktable
#| include: true
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsurvfit)

# install.packages("ggsurvfit") # выполнить один раз, если пакета нет

landmark_hours  <- 24
landmark_days   <- landmark_hours / 24
max_follow_days <- 28
max_follow_after_landmark <- max_follow_days - landmark_days

# TRUE = логика:
# выписанные живыми до 28-го дня считаются выжившими к 28-му дню.
#
# FALSE = классический KM:
# выписка живым после landmark цензурируется на дате выписки.
assume_discharged_alive_to_28 <- TRUE

first_non_missing <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) NA else x[1]
}

df_landmark_raw <- patients_tidy %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    icu_to_HA1_hours    = first_non_missing(icu_to_HA1_hours),
    ICU_in_dt           = first_non_missing(ICU_in_dt),
    ICU_out_or_death_dt = first_non_missing(ICU_out_or_death_dt),
    outcome             = first_non_missing(outcome),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(ICU_in_dt),
    !is.na(icu_to_HA1_hours)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    time_from_icu_days = as.numeric(
      ICU_out_or_death_dt - ICU_in_dt,
      units = "days"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.na(time_from_icu_days) | time_from_icu_days >= 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    status_at_landmark = case_when(
      !is.na(time_from_icu_days) &
        time_from_icu_days <= landmark_days &
        outcome == "Умер" ~
        "Исключён: умер до/в landmark",

      !is.na(time_from_icu_days) &
        time_from_icu_days <= landmark_days ~
        "Исключён: выбыл/выписан до/в landmark",

      TRUE ~
        "Оставлен в landmark-анализе"
    )
  )

# Контрольная таблица: кого исключили до landmark
landmark_flow <- df_landmark_raw %>%
  count(status_at_landmark, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    percent = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)
  )

landmark_flow

df_landmark <- df_landmark_raw %>%
  filter(status_at_landmark == "Оставлен в landmark-анализе") %>%
  mutate(
    sorption_by_landmark = case_when(
      icu_to_HA1_hours <= landmark_hours ~
        paste0("ГС до ", landmark_hours, " ч"),
      TRUE ~
        paste0("ГС после ", landmark_hours, " ч")
    ),

    # Событие: смерть после landmark, но не позже 28-го дня от поступления в ОРИТ
    event_landmark_28 = if_else(
      !is.na(time_from_icu_days) &
        outcome == "Умер" &
        time_from_icu_days > landmark_days &
        time_from_icu_days <= max_follow_days,
      1L,
      0L
    ),

    # Время отсчитываем от landmark, а не от поступления в ОРИТ
    time_landmark_28 = case_when(
      event_landmark_28 == 1L ~
        time_from_icu_days - landmark_days,

      assume_discharged_alive_to_28 ~
        max_follow_after_landmark,

      !is.na(time_from_icu_days) &
        time_from_icu_days > landmark_days ~
        pmin(time_from_icu_days, max_follow_days) - landmark_days,

      TRUE ~
        max_follow_after_landmark
    ),

    time_landmark_28 = pmax(time_landmark_28, 0),

sorption_by_landmark = factor(
  sorption_by_landmark,
  levels = c(
    paste0("ГС до ", landmark_hours, " ч"),
    paste0("ГС после ", landmark_hours, " ч")
  )
)
  )

# Контрольная таблица: группы после landmark
df_landmark %>%
  count(sorption_by_landmark, name = "n")

fit_landmark <- survfit2(
  Surv(time_landmark_28, event_landmark_28) ~ sorption_by_landmark,
  data = df_landmark
)

logrank_landmark <- survdiff(
  Surv(time_landmark_28, event_landmark_28) ~ sorption_by_landmark,
  data = df_landmark
)

pval_landmark <- 1 - pchisq(
  logrank_landmark$chisq,
  df = length(logrank_landmark$n) - 1
)

p_txt <- paste0(
  "log-rank p = ",
  format.pval(pval_landmark, digits = 2, eps = 0.001)
)

censor_label <- if (assume_discharged_alive_to_28) {
  "Цензурировано к 28 дню"
} else {
  "Цензурировано/выписано"
}

ggsurvfit(fit_landmark) +
  add_confidence_interval() +
  add_risktable(
    risktable_stats = c("n.risk", "cum.event", "cum.censor"),
    stats_label = list(
      n.risk = "Осталось под риском",
      cum.event = "Умерло",
      cum.censor = censor_label
    ),
    risktable_height = 0.35
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, max_follow_after_landmark, by = 7),
    limits = c(0, max_follow_after_landmark)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = paste0(
      "Landmark analysis: 28-дневная выживаемость от ",
      landmark_hours,
      " ч"
    ),
    subtitle = p_txt,
    x = paste0("Дни после landmark-точки ", landmark_hours, " ч"),
    y = "Вероятность выживания",
    color = NULL,
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw()

```

## Setup для T0

```{r}

#| label: baseline_compare_reuse_gtsummary_pat_setup
#| include: false
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

stopifnot(
  exists("pt_top"),
  exists("vars_top"),
  exists("lbl_top"),
  exists("vars_bottom"),
  exists("lbl_bottom")
)

# Берём переменные из уже собранного gtsummary_pat:
# - верхние baseline-показатели из vars_top
# - шкалы/лабораторию на T0 из vars_bottom
#
# Для confounding-таблиц убираем явно не baseline/не исходные характеристики:
# outcome, CGI-E, итоговые количества устройств.
vars_t0_compare <- c(
  setdiff(
    vars_top,
    c(
      "icu_to_HA1_hours",
      "CT_count_pos",
      "LPS_count_pos",
      "devices_total_pos",
      "HA_efficency_CGI_E",
      "outcome"
    )
  ),
  vars_bottom
) %>%
  unique()

lbl_t0_compare <- c(lbl_top, lbl_bottom)
lbl_t0_compare <- lbl_t0_compare[!duplicated(names(lbl_t0_compare))]
lbl_t0_compare <- lbl_t0_compare[
  names(lbl_t0_compare) %in% vars_t0_compare
]
```

## T0: Landmark Ранняя vs поздняя ГС

```{r}

#| label: baseline_t0_by_landmark_sorption_reuse
#| include: true
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

stopifnot(exists("df_landmark"))
stopifnot(exists("landmark_hours"))
stopifnot("sorption_by_landmark" %in% names(df_landmark))

pt_landmark_t0 <- pt_top %>%
  inner_join(
    df_landmark %>%
      select(pat_record_id, sorption_by_landmark),
    by = "pat_record_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sorption_by_landmark = factor(
      sorption_by_landmark,
      levels = c(
        paste0("ГС до ", landmark_hours, " ч"),
        paste0("ГС после ", landmark_hours, " ч")
      )
    )
  )

tbl_baseline_landmark_sorption <- pt_landmark_t0 %>%
  select(sorption_by_landmark, any_of(vars_t0_compare)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = sorption_by_landmark,
    type = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used",
        "from_other_ICU_transfer"
      )) ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used",
        "from_other_ICU_transfer"
      )) ~ "Да"
    ),
    statistic = stat_top,
    label = lbl_t0_compare,
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "wilcox.test",
      all_categorical() ~ "fisher.test"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(
    label ~ "**Показатель на T0**",
    all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}",
    p.value ~ "**p**"
  ) %>%
  modify_caption(
    paste0(
```
