```{r}
      "**Исходные характеристики на T0 в landmark-популяции: ",
      "ГС до ",
      landmark_hours,
      " ч vs ГС после ",
      landmark_hours,
      " ч**"
    )
  ) %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_baseline_landmark_sorption
```

## T0: перевод из другого ОРИТ, все пациенты

```{r}

#| label: baseline_t0_by_transfer_all_reuse
#| include: true
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

pt_transfer_t0 <- pt_top %>%
  mutate(
    transfer_group = case_when(
      from_other_ICU_transfer == "Да"  ~ "Переведён из другого ОРИТ",
      from_other_ICU_transfer == "Нет" ~ "Не переведён из другого ОРИТ",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    transfer_group = factor(
      transfer_group,
      levels = c(
        "Переведён из другого ОРИТ",
        "Не переведён из другого ОРИТ"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(transfer_group))

vars_transfer_compare <- setdiff(
  vars_t0_compare,
  "from_other_ICU_transfer"
)

lbl_transfer_compare <- lbl_t0_compare[
  names(lbl_t0_compare) %in% vars_transfer_compare
]

tbl_baseline_transfer <- pt_transfer_t0 %>%
  select(transfer_group, any_of(vars_transfer_compare)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = transfer_group,
    type = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used"
      )) ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used"
      )) ~ "Да"
    ),
    statistic = stat_top,
    label = lbl_transfer_compare,
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "wilcox.test",
      all_categorical() ~ "fisher.test"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(
    label ~ "**Показатель на T0**",
    all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}",
    p.value ~ "**p**"
  ) %>%
  modify_caption(
    "**Исходные характеристики на T0: пациенты с переводом из другого ОРИТ и без перевода**"
  ) %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_baseline_transfer
```

## T0: тип антикоагуляции при `Гемоперфузия 1`, все пациенты

```{r}

#| label: baseline_t0_by_HA1_anticoagulation_all_reuse
#| include: true
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

norm0_local <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00A0", " ")
  str_to_lower(str_squish(x))
}

first_non_empty <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & str_squish(x) != ""]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_character_)
  x[1]
}

ha_start_col <- intersect(
  c("HA_start_dt", "HA_start_datetime"),
  names(HA_tidy)
)[1]

ha1_anticoagulation <- HA_tidy %>%
  filter(HA_parameter == "Гемоперфузия 1") %>%
  mutate(
    HA_anticoagulation_other_norm = norm0_local(HA_anticoagulation_other),

  HA_anticoagulation_cat = case_when(
  HA_anticoagulation == "Цитрат" ~ "Цитрат",
  HA_anticoagulation == "Гепарин" ~ "Гепарин",

  HA_anticoagulation %in% c("Без антикоагуляции", "без антикоагуляции") ~
    "Другое / без антикоагуляции",

  HA_anticoagulation %in% c("Другой", "Другое") ~
    "Другое / без антикоагуляции",

  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)
  )

if (!is.na(ha_start_col)) {
  ha1_anticoagulation <- ha1_anticoagulation %>%
    arrange(pat_record_id, .data[[ha_start_col]])
} else {
  ha1_anticoagulation <- ha1_anticoagulation %>%
    arrange(pat_record_id)
}

ha1_anticoagulation <- ha1_anticoagulation %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    HA_anticoagulation_cat = first_non_empty(HA_anticoagulation_cat),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
HA_anticoagulation_cat = factor(
  HA_anticoagulation_cat,
  levels = c(
    "Цитрат",
    "Гепарин",
    "Другое / без антикоагуляции"
  )
)
  )

pt_anticoag_t0 <- pt_top %>%
  inner_join(
    ha1_anticoagulation,
    by = "pat_record_id"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(HA_anticoagulation_cat))

tbl_baseline_anticoag <- pt_anticoag_t0 %>%
  select(HA_anticoagulation_cat, any_of(vars_t0_compare)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = HA_anticoagulation_cat,
    type = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used",
        "from_other_ICU_transfer"
      )) ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used",
        "from_other_ICU_transfer"
      )) ~ "Да"
    ),
    statistic = stat_top,
    label = lbl_t0_compare,
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "kruskal.test",
      all_categorical() ~ "fisher.test"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(
    label ~ "**Показатель на T0**",
    all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}",
    p.value ~ "**p**"
  ) %>%
  modify_caption(
    "**Исходные характеристики на T0 по типу антикоагуляции при первой гемоперфузии**"
  ) %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_baseline_anticoag

```

## T0: МНО \< 1.4 vs МНО ≥ 1.4, все пациенты

```{r}

#| label: baseline_t0_by_INR_all_reuse
#| include: true
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

pt_inr_t0 <- pt_top %>%
  mutate(
    INR_group = case_when(
      INR < 1.4  ~ "МНО < 1.4",
      INR >= 1.4 ~ "МНО ≥ 1.4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    INR_group = factor(
      INR_group,
      levels = c("МНО < 1.4", "МНО ≥ 1.4")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(INR_group))

vars_t0_compare_inr <- setdiff(vars_t0_compare, "INR")
lbl_t0_compare_inr <- lbl_t0_compare[
  names(lbl_t0_compare) %in% vars_t0_compare_inr
]

tbl_baseline_inr_t0 <- pt_inr_t0 %>%
  select(INR_group, any_of(vars_t0_compare_inr)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = INR_group,
    type = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used",
        "from_other_ICU_transfer"
      )) ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      any_of(c(
        "vasopressors_if_used",
        "RRT_if_used",
        "MV_if_used",
        "from_other_ICU_transfer"
      )) ~ "Да"
    ),
    statistic = stat_top,
    label = lbl_t0_compare_inr,
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "wilcox.test",
      all_categorical() ~ "fisher.test"
    )
  ) %>%
  modify_header(
    label ~ "**Показатель на T0**",
    all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}",
    p.value ~ "**p**"
  ) %>%
  modify_caption(
    "**Исходные характеристики на T0: МНО < 1.4 и МНО ≥ 1.4**"
  ) %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_baseline_inr_t0

```

## Save T0 tables

```{r}

#| label: export_baseline_tables_docx
#| include: true
#| cache: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

dir.create("tables", showWarnings = FALSE)

flextable::save_as_docx(
  # "Ранняя vs поздняя ГС, landmark-популяция" =
  #   as_flex_table(tbl_baseline_landmark_sorption),
  # 
  # "Перевод из другого ОРИТ, все пациенты" =
  #   as_flex_table(tbl_baseline_transfer),
  # 
  # "Тип антикоагуляции, все пациенты" =
  #   as_flex_table(tbl_baseline_anticoag),

  "МНО на T0, все пациенты" =
    as_flex_table(tbl_baseline_inr_t0),

  path = "tables/baseline_comparison_tables.docx"
)

```

# 28-day mortality early vs late

```{r}

#| label: mortality_28d_early_vs_late_table
#| include: true

library(dplyr)

df_28 <- patients_tidy %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    icu_to_HA1_hours = {
      x <- icu_to_HA1_hours
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else dplyr::first(x[!is.na(x)])
    },
    ICU_in_dt = {
      x <- ICU_in_dt
      if (all(is.na(x))) as.POSIXct(NA) else dplyr::first(x[!is.na(x)])
    },
    ICU_out_or_death_dt = {
      x <- ICU_out_or_death_dt
      if (all(is.na(x))) as.POSIXct(NA) else dplyr::first(x[!is.na(x)])
    },
    outcome = {
      x <- outcome
      if (all(is.na(x))) NA_character_ else dplyr::first(x[!is.na(x)])
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(icu_to_HA1_hours),
    !is.na(ICU_in_dt)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    early_start = if_else(
      icu_to_HA1_hours < 24,
      "Раннее (<24ч)",
      "Позднее (≥24ч)"
    ),
    time_days = as.numeric(ICU_out_or_death_dt - ICU_in_dt, units = "days"),
    death_28 = if_else(
      !is.na(time_days) & outcome == "Умер" & time_days <= 28,
      1L,
      0L
    )
  )

tab_28 <- df_28 %>%
  group_by(early_start) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    deaths_28 = sum(death_28, na.rm = TRUE),
    alive_28 = N - deaths_28,
    mortality_28 = sprintf("%.1f%% (%d/%d)", 100 * deaths_28 / N, deaths_28, N),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

tab_28

# 2x2 таблица для Fisher exact test
mat_28 <- table(df_28$early_start, df_28$death_28)

mat_28
fisher.test(mat_28)
```

# Outcome по антикоагуляции

```{r}
#| label: outcome_by_anticoagulation
#| cache: true
#| echo: false

# Простая patient-level таблица исходов в зависимости от антикоагуляции.
# Важно: берем антикоагуляцию ПЕРВОЙ гемосорбции на пациента,
# чтобы один пациент не попадал в таблицу несколько раз.

first_non_empty <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & str_squish(x) != ""]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_character_)
  x[1]
}

ha_first_anticoag <- HA_tidy %>%
  mutate(
    HA_anticoagulation_cat = case_when(
      HA_anticoagulation == "Цитрат"  ~ "Цитрат",
      HA_anticoagulation == "Гепарин" ~ "Гепарин",
      HA_anticoagulation == "Другой" &
        norm0(coalesce(HA_anticoagulation_other, "")) %in% c("без антикоагуляции") ~ "Без антикоагуляции",
      HA_anticoagulation == "Другой" ~ "Другой",
      TRUE ~ "Другой"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(pat_record_id, HA_start_dt) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    HA_anticoagulation_cat = first_non_empty(HA_anticoagulation_cat),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    HA_anticoagulation_cat = factor(
      HA_anticoagulation_cat,
      levels = c("Гепарин", "Цитрат", "Без антикоагуляции", "Другой")
    )
  )

pt_outcome <- patients_tidy %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    outcome = first_non_empty(outcome),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = factor(
      outcome,
      levels = c(
        "Выписан из ОРИТ",
        "Продолжает находиться в ОРИТ",
        "Переведён в другой ОРИТ",
        "Умер"
      )
    )
  )

outcome_by_anticoag_df <- pt_outcome %>%
  left_join(ha_first_anticoag, by = "pat_record_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(HA_anticoagulation_cat), !is.na(outcome))

tbl_outcome_by_anticoag <- outcome_by_anticoag_df %>%
  select(HA_anticoagulation_cat, outcome) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = HA_anticoagulation_cat,
    statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})",
    missing = "no",
    label = list(outcome = "Исход")
  ) %>%
  modify_header(label = "**Исход**") %>%
  modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
  modify_caption("**Исходы в зависимости от антикоагуляции при первой гемосорбции**") %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_outcome_by_anticoag

```

# Проверка VIS2020_0_excl

```{r}

#| label: vis2020_check_pairs
#| include: false

vis_tbl_pairs <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, VIS2020_0_excl) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = VIS2020_0_excl) %>%
  filter(!is.na(m12h_0h), !is.na(`48h_72h`))

vis_plot_pairs <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, VIS2020_0_excl) %>%
  mutate(value = if_else(!is.na(VIS2020_0_excl) & VIS2020_0_excl <= 0, NA_real_, VIS2020_0_excl)) %>%
  select(-VIS2020_0_excl) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(m12h_0h), !is.na(`48h_72h`))

nrow(vis_tbl_pairs)
nrow(vis_plot_pairs)

setdiff(vis_tbl_pairs$pat_record_id, vis_plot_pairs$pat_record_id)
```

# Презентация (PPTX)

## Слайд 1. Общие показатели

```{r}
#| label: pptx_slide1
#| include: true

stopifnot(exists("patients_tidy"), exists("HA_tidy"))

cartridge_col <- dplyr::case_when(
  "HA_cartrige_type" %in% names(HA_tidy) ~ "HA_cartrige_type",
  "HA_cartrige_type_std" %in% names(HA_tidy) ~ "HA_cartrige_type_std",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)
if (is.na(cartridge_col)) stop("Не найден столбец HA_cartrige_type / HA_cartrige_type_std в HA_tidy")

n_pat     <- dplyr::n_distinct(patients_tidy$pat_record_id)
n_centers <- dplyr::n_distinct(patients_tidy$organization)

n_ct  <- sum(HA_tidy[[cartridge_col]] == "CT",  na.rm = TRUE)
n_lps <- sum(HA_tidy[[cartridge_col]] == "LPS", na.rm = TRUE)
n_lps_neo <- sum(HA_tidy[[cartridge_col]] == "LPS NEO", na.rm = TRUE)

mean_sorp <- HA_tidy %>%
  filter(!is.na(pat_record_id), pat_record_id != "") %>%
  count(pat_record_id, name = "n_sorptions") %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(n_sorptions), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pull(mean)

# Период: min–max по HA_start_dt (если есть); иначе пробуем распарсить raw
dt_vec <- HA_tidy %>%
  filter(HA_parameter == "Гемоперфузия 1") %>%
  { 
    if ("HA_start_dt" %in% names(.)) .$HA_start_dt
    else if ("HA_start_datetime_raw" %in% names(.)) suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(.$HA_start_datetime_raw, tz = "UTC"))
    else suppressWarnings(as.POSIXct(.$HA_start_datetime, tz = "UTC"))
  }
dt_vec <- dt_vec[!is.na(dt_vec)]

period_txt <- if (!length(dt_vec)) {
  "n/a"
} else {
  paste0(
    format(as.Date(min(dt_vec), tz = "UTC"), "%d.%m.%Y"),
    "–",
    format(as.Date(max(dt_vec), tz = "UTC"), "%d.%m.%Y")
  )
}

table1 <- tibble::tibble(
  Показатель = c("Период", "Пациентов", "Центров", "Сорбций CT", "Сорбций LPS", "Сорбций LPS NEO", "Сорбций на пациента в среднем"),
  Значение   = c(period_txt, fmt_int(n_pat), fmt_int(n_centers), fmt_int(n_ct), fmt_int(n_lps),fmt_int(n_lps_neo), fmt_2(mean_sorp))
)

flx1 <- flextable::flextable(table1) %>% flextable::autofit()
invisible(flextable::save_as_pptx(flx1, path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table1_general.pptx")))
flx1
```

## Слайд 2. Данные по пациентам на момент включения

```{r}

#| label: pptx_slide2
#| include: true

# Блоки ниже готовят отдельные объекты для слайдов PowerPoint.
# stopifnot() нужен как защита: если нужная таблица не была создана выше,
# скрипт остановится с понятной ошибкой, а не продолжит молча работать с пустотой.
stopifnot(exists("patients_tidy"))

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"

pt0 <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint == tp0) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

if (!"first_sorption_type" %in% names(pt0)) stop("В patients_tidy нет first_sorption_type (ожидается из ETL).")

# --- Основные характеристики ---
vars_base <- c(
  "first_sorption_type",
  "age_yr",
  "sex",
  "icu_to_HA1_hours",
  "SOFA",
  "VIS2020_0_excl",
  "PaFiO2_calc",
  "procalcitonin",
  "C_react_protein",
  "lymphocytes",
  "thrombocytes",
  "lactate"
)

tbl_base <- pt0 %>%
  select(any_of(vars_base)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = first_sorption_type,
    type = list(
      age_yr ~ "continuous",
      icu_to_HA1_hours ~ "continuous",
      SOFA ~ "continuous",
      VIS2020_0_excl ~ "continuous",
      PaFiO2_calc ~ "continuous",
      procalcitonin ~ "continuous",
      C_react_protein ~ "continuous",
      lymphocytes ~ "continuous",
      thrombocytes ~ "continuous",
      lactate ~ "continuous",
      sex ~ "categorical"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})"
    ),
    label = list(
      age_yr = "Возраст (лет)",
      sex = "Пол",
      icu_to_HA1_hours = "Время между поступлением в ОРИТ и началом ГС, ч",
      SOFA = "SOFA",
      VIS2020_0_excl = "Индекс VIS2020",
      PaFiO2_calc = "Индекс оксигенации (PaO2/FiO2)",
      procalcitonin = "Прокальцитонин",
      C_react_protein = "C-реактивный белок",
      lymphocytes = "Лимфоциты",
      thrombocytes = "Тромбоциты",
      lactate = "Лактат"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
  bold_labels()

# --- Показания к гемосорбции: септические (1) vs асептические (0) ---
tbl_indications <- NULL
if ("is_septic" %in% names(pt0)) {
  pt0_septic <- pt0 %>%
    transmute(
      first_sorption_type,
      is_septic_cat = factor(
        dplyr::case_when(
          is_septic == 1 ~ "Септические",
          is_septic == 0 ~ "Асептические",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        levels = c("Септические", "Асептические")
      )
    )

  tbl_indications <- pt0_septic %>%
    tbl_summary(
      by = first_sorption_type,
      type = list(is_septic_cat ~ "categorical"),
      statistic = list(all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
      label = list(is_septic_cat = "Септические / асептические"),
      missing = "no"
    ) %>%
    modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
    bold_labels()
}

# --- Патогены ---
tbl_path <- NULL
if ("pat_gram_stain" %in% names(pt0)) {
  pt0_path <- pt0 %>%
    mutate(
      pat_gram_stain_slide = pat_gram_stain_for_tables(pat_gram_stain)
    )

  if (any(!is.na(pt0_path$pat_gram_stain_slide))) {
    tbl_path <- pt0_path %>%
      select(first_sorption_type, pat_gram_stain_slide) %>%
      tbl_summary(
        by = first_sorption_type,
        type = all_categorical() ~ "categorical",
        statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
        label = list(pat_gram_stain_slide = "Бактериальная флора по Граму"),
        missing = "no"
      ) %>%
      modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
      bold_labels()
  }
}

# --- Сборка в одну таблицу ---
tbl_list <- list(tbl_base)
hdrs <- c("Исходные по пациентам")
if (!is.null(tbl_indications)) {
  tbl_list <- append(tbl_list, list(tbl_indications))
  hdrs <- c(hdrs, "Показания к гемосорбции")
}
if (!is.null(tbl_path)) {
  tbl_list <- append(tbl_list, list(tbl_path))
  hdrs <- c(hdrs, "Бактериальная флора по Граму")
}

tbl2 <- gtsummary::tbl_stack(tbl_list, group_header = hdrs)

# Сделать один столбец "Characteristic": перенести group headers в него и убрать отдельный столбец Group
if (!is.null(tbl2$table_body) && "groupname" %in% names(tbl2$table_body)) {
  tbl2$table_body <- tbl2$table_body %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      label = dplyr::if_else(.data$row_type == "group_header", .data$groupname, .data$label)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-groupname)

  if (!is.null(tbl2$table_header) && "column" %in% names(tbl2$table_header)) {
    tbl2$table_header <- tbl2$table_header %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$column != "groupname")
  }
}

flx2 <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl2)
invisible(flextable::save_as_pptx(flx2, path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table2_patients.pptx")))
flx2
```

### Слайд 2а

```{r}

#| label: pptx_slide2_lps_total
#| include: true

stopifnot(exists("patients_tidy"))

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"

pt0 <- patients_tidy %>%
  filter(timepoint == tp0) %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

if (!"first_sorption_type" %in% names(pt0)) {
  stop("В patients_tidy нет first_sorption_type (ожидается из ETL).")
}

# Объединяем LPS и LPS NEO в одну группу LPS TOTAL
pt0 <- pt0 %>%
  mutate(
    first_sorption_type_total = dplyr::case_when(
      first_sorption_type %in% c("LPS", "LPS NEO") ~ "LPS TOTAL",
      TRUE ~ as.character(first_sorption_type)
    )
  )

# Чтобы LPS TOTAL шел первым столбцом
group_levels <- c(
  "LPS TOTAL",
  setdiff(sort(unique(pt0$first_sorption_type_total)), "LPS TOTAL")
)
group_levels <- unique(group_levels[group_levels %in% unique(pt0$first_sorption_type_total)])

pt0 <- pt0 %>%
  mutate(
    first_sorption_type_total = factor(first_sorption_type_total, levels = group_levels),

    # Потребность в вазопрессорах
    vasopressors_if_used = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_to_lower(vasopressors_if_used) == "да"  ~ "Да",
      stringr::str_to_lower(vasopressors_if_used) == "нет" ~ "Нет",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    vasopressors_if_used = factor(vasopressors_if_used, levels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    # first_sorption_dt используем как старт ГС
    HA1_start_dt = first_sorption_dt,

    # Потребность в ЗПТ / ИВЛ
    RRT_if_used = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(RRT_start_dt) ~ "Нет",
      is.na(HA1_start_dt) ~ NA_character_,
      HA1_start_dt >= (RRT_start_dt - lubridate::hours(12)) &
        (is.na(RRT_resolution_dt) | HA1_start_dt <= RRT_resolution_dt) ~ "Да",
      TRUE ~ "Нет"
    ),
    MV_if_used = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(MV_start_dt) ~ "Нет",
      is.na(HA1_start_dt) ~ NA_character_,
      HA1_start_dt >= (MV_start_dt - lubridate::hours(12)) &
        (is.na(MV_resolution_dt) | HA1_start_dt <= MV_resolution_dt) ~ "Да",
      TRUE ~ "Нет"
    ),

    RRT_if_used = factor(RRT_if_used, levels = c("Да", "Нет")),
    MV_if_used  = factor(MV_if_used,  levels = c("Да", "Нет"))
  )

# --- Основные характеристики ---
vars_base <- c(
  "first_sorption_type_total",
  "age_yr",
  "sex",
  "icu_to_HA1_hours",
  "SOFA",
  "VIS2020_0_excl",
  "PaFiO2_calc",
  "procalcitonin",
  "C_react_protein",
  "lymphocytes",
  "thrombocytes",
  "lactate",
  "vasopressors_if_used",
  "RRT_if_used",
  "MV_if_used"
)

tbl_base <- pt0 %>%
  select(any_of(vars_base)) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = first_sorption_type_total,
    type = list(
      age_yr ~ "continuous",
      icu_to_HA1_hours ~ "continuous",
      SOFA ~ "continuous",
      VIS2020_0_excl ~ "continuous",
      PaFiO2_calc ~ "continuous",
      procalcitonin ~ "continuous",
      C_react_protein ~ "continuous",
      lymphocytes ~ "continuous",
      thrombocytes ~ "continuous",
      lactate ~ "continuous",
      sex ~ "categorical",
      vasopressors_if_used ~ "dichotomous",
      RRT_if_used ~ "dichotomous",
      MV_if_used ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      vasopressors_if_used ~ "Да",
      RRT_if_used ~ "Да",
      MV_if_used ~ "Да"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})"
    ),
    label = list(
      age_yr = "Возраст (лет)",
      sex = "Пол",
      icu_to_HA1_hours = "Время между поступлением в ОРИТ и началом ГС, ч",
      SOFA = "SOFA",
      VIS2020_0_excl = "Индекс VIS2020",
      PaFiO2_calc = "Индекс оксигенации (PaO2/FiO2)",
      procalcitonin = "Прокальцитонин",
      C_react_protein = "C-реактивный белок",
      lymphocytes = "Лимфоциты",
      thrombocytes = "Тромбоциты",
      lactate = "Лактат",
      vasopressors_if_used = "Потребность в вазопрессорах",
      RRT_if_used = "Потребность в ЗПТ",
      MV_if_used = "Потребность в ИВЛ"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
  bold_labels()

# --- Показания к гемосорбции ---
tbl_indications <- NULL
if ("is_septic" %in% names(pt0)) {
  pt0_septic <- pt0 %>%
    transmute(
      first_sorption_type_total,
      is_septic_cat = factor(
        dplyr::case_when(
          is_septic == 1 ~ "Септические",
          is_septic == 0 ~ "Асептические",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        levels = c("Септические", "Асептические")
      )
    )

  tbl_indications <- pt0_septic %>%
    tbl_summary(
      by = first_sorption_type_total,
      type = list(is_septic_cat ~ "categorical"),
      statistic = list(all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
      label = list(is_septic_cat = "Септические / асептические"),
      missing = "no"
    ) %>%
    modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
    bold_labels()
}

# --- Патогены ---
tbl_path <- NULL
if ("pat_gram_stain" %in% names(pt0)) {
  pt0_path <- pt0 %>%
    mutate(
      pat_gram_stain_slide = pat_gram_stain_for_tables(pat_gram_stain)
    )

  if (any(!is.na(pt0_path$pat_gram_stain_slide))) {
    tbl_path <- pt0_path %>%
      select(first_sorption_type_total, pat_gram_stain_slide) %>%
      tbl_summary(
        by = first_sorption_type_total,
        type = all_categorical() ~ "categorical",
        statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
        label = list(pat_gram_stain_slide = "Бактериальная флора по Граму"),
        missing = "no"
      ) %>%
      modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
      bold_labels()
  }
}

# --- Сборка в одну таблицу ---
tbl_list <- list(tbl_base)
hdrs <- c("Исходные по пациентам")

if (!is.null(tbl_indications)) {
  tbl_list <- append(tbl_list, list(tbl_indications))
  hdrs <- c(hdrs, "Показания к гемосорбции")
}

if (!is.null(tbl_path)) {
  tbl_list <- append(tbl_list, list(tbl_path))
  hdrs <- c(hdrs, "Бактериальная флора по Граму")
}

tbl2_total <- gtsummary::tbl_stack(tbl_list, group_header = hdrs)

# Переносим group headers в один столбец Characteristic
if (!is.null(tbl2_total$table_body) && "groupname" %in% names(tbl2_total$table_body)) {
  tbl2_total$table_body <- tbl2_total$table_body %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      label = dplyr::if_else(.data$row_type == "group_header", .data$groupname, .data$label)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-groupname)

  if (!is.null(tbl2_total$table_header) && "column" %in% names(tbl2_total$table_header)) {
    tbl2_total$table_header <- tbl2_total$table_header %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$column != "groupname")
  }
}

flx2_total <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl2_total)
invisible(flextable::save_as_pptx(flx2_total, path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table2_patients_lps_total.pptx")))
flx2_total
```

## Слайд 3. Данные по сорбциям

```{r}
#| label: pptx_slide3
#| include: true

stopifnot(exists("tbl_ha_gtsummary_compact"))

flx3 <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl_ha_gtsummary_compact) %>%
  flextable::autofit()

invisible(flextable::save_as_pptx(flx3, path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table3_sorptions.pptx")))
flx3
```

## Слайд 4. Исходы

```{r}

#| label: pptx_slide4
#| include: true

# Здесь собираем таблицу исходов по НОВЫМ точкам,
# которые уже переопределены в analysis_population_by_clin_assess_order
# и сохранены в patients_analysis_clin_window.

sofa_col <- "SOFA"
vis_col  <- "VIS2020_0_excl"
cgi_col  <- "HA_efficency_CGI_E"

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"
tp1 <- "48h_72h"

first_non_na <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & as.character(x) != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) NA else x[1]
}

# --- 1 строка на пациента ---
# Берем данные уже из patients_analysis_clin_window,
# то есть из датасета со сдвинутыми таймпойнтами.
out_df <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    first_sorption_type = first_non_na(first_sorption_type),
    outcome = first_non_na(outcome),
    ICU_in_dt = first_non_na(ICU_in_dt),
    ICU_out_or_death_dt = first_non_na(ICU_out_or_death_dt),
    CGI_E_raw = first_non_na(.data[[cgi_col]]),

    SOFA_m12 = first_non_na(.data[[sofa_col]][timepoint == tp0]),
    SOFA_48_72 = first_non_na(.data[[sofa_col]][timepoint == tp1]),

    VIS_m12 = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp0]),
    VIS_48_72 = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp1]),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- derived outcomes ---
out_df <- out_df %>%
  mutate(
    outcome_norm = norm_txt(outcome),

    # Время до выписки из ОРИТ: только для outcome == "Выписан из ОРИТ"
    time_to_icu_discharge_h = dplyr::if_else(
      outcome_norm == "Выписан из ОРИТ" & !is.na(ICU_in_dt) & !is.na(ICU_out_or_death_dt),
      as.numeric(difftime(ICU_out_or_death_dt, ICU_in_dt, units = "hours")),
      NA_real_
    ),

    # CGI-E: 2 уровня
    CGI_E_2lvl = {
      x <- norm_txt(CGI_E_raw)
      dplyr::case_when(
        x %in% c(
          "Без изменений или хуже",
          "Минимальное улучшение. Незначительное улучшение, не влияющее на клинический статус пациента"
        ) ~ "Нет улучшений",
        x %in% c(
          "Отмечено значительное улучшение. Полная или почти полная ремиссия симптомов",
          "Умеренное улучшение. Частичная ремиссия симптомов"
        ) ~ "Есть улучшения",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ) %>%
        factor(levels = c("Есть улучшения", "Нет улучшений"))
    },

    SOFA_drop_2plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(SOFA_m12) & !is.na(SOFA_48_72) ~ (SOFA_m12 - SOFA_48_72 >= 2),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    VIS_drop_20plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(VIS_m12) & !is.na(VIS_48_72) ~ (VIS_m12 - VIS_48_72 >= 20),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    mortality = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Умер" ~ "Умер",
      !is.na(outcome_norm)   ~ "Не умер",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Умер", "Не умер"))
  )

tbl4 <- out_df %>%
select(first_sorption_type, time_to_icu_discharge_h, CGI_E_2lvl, SOFA_drop_2plus, VIS_drop_20plus, mortality) %>%
tbl_summary(
  by = first_sorption_type,
  type = list(
    CGI_E_2lvl ~ "dichotomous",
    SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "dichotomous",
    VIS_drop_20plus ~ "dichotomous",
    mortality ~ "dichotomous"
  ),
  value = list(
    CGI_E_2lvl ~ "Есть улучшения",
    SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "Да",
    VIS_drop_20plus ~ "Да",
    mortality ~ "Умер"
  ),
  statistic = list(
    time_to_icu_discharge_h ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
    all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
  ),
  label = list(
    time_to_icu_discharge_h = "Время до выписки из ОРИТ, ч",
    CGI_E_2lvl = "CGI-E: есть улучшения",
    SOFA_drop_2plus = "Снижение SOFA ≥ 2 за 72 ч",
    VIS_drop_20plus = "Снижение VIS2020 ≥ 20 за 72 ч",
    mortality = "Летальность"
  ),
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
  bold_labels()

flx4 <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl4) %>%
  flextable::autofit()

invisible(flextable::save_as_pptx(flx4, path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table4_outcomes.pptx")))
flx4
```

### Исходы по переводам из ОРИТ

```{r}
#| label: pptx_slide4_transfer
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"
tp1 <- "48h_72h"

out_df_transfer <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    from_other_ICU_transfer = first_non_na(from_other_ICU_transfer),
    outcome_raw = first_non_na(outcome),
    CGI_E_raw   = first_non_na(.data[[cgi_col]]),

    ICU_in_dt = first_non_na(ICU_in_dt),
    ICU_out_or_death_dt = first_non_na(ICU_out_or_death_dt),

    SOFA_m12   = first_non_na(SOFA[timepoint == tp0]),
    SOFA_48_72 = first_non_na(SOFA[timepoint == tp1]),

    VIS_m12    = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp0]),
    VIS_48_72  = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp1]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome_norm = norm_txt(outcome_raw),

    time_to_icu_discharge_h = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Выписан из ОРИТ" & !is.na(ICU_in_dt) & !is.na(ICU_out_or_death_dt) ~
        as.numeric(difftime(ICU_out_or_death_dt, ICU_in_dt, units = "hours")),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    CGI_E_2lvl = {
      x <- norm_txt(CGI_E_raw)
      dplyr::case_when(
        x %in% c(
          "Без изменений или хуже",
          "Минимальное улучшение. Незначительное улучшение, не влияющее на клинический статус пациента"
        ) ~ "Нет улучшений",
        x %in% c(
          "Отмечено значительное улучшение. Полная или почти полная ремиссия симптомов",
          "Умеренное улучшение. Частичная ремиссия симптомов"
        ) ~ "Есть улучшения",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ) %>%
        factor(levels = c("Есть улучшения", "Нет улучшений"))
    },

    SOFA_drop_2plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(SOFA_m12) & !is.na(SOFA_48_72) ~ (SOFA_m12 - SOFA_48_72 >= 2),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    VIS_drop_20plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(VIS_m12) & !is.na(VIS_48_72) ~ (VIS_m12 - VIS_48_72 >= 20),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    mortality = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Умер" ~ "Умер",
      !is.na(outcome_norm)   ~ "Не умер",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Умер", "Не умер"))
  )

make_outcome_tbl <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    select(
      time_to_icu_discharge_h,
      CGI_E_2lvl,
      SOFA_drop_2plus,
      VIS_drop_20plus,
      mortality
    ) %>%
    tbl_summary(
      type = list(
        CGI_E_2lvl ~ "dichotomous",
        SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "dichotomous",
        VIS_drop_20plus ~ "dichotomous",
        mortality ~ "dichotomous"
      ),
      value = list(
        CGI_E_2lvl ~ "Есть улучшения",
        SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "Да",
        VIS_drop_20plus ~ "Да",
        mortality ~ "Умер"
      ),
      statistic = list(
        time_to_icu_discharge_h ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
        all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
      ),
      label = list(
        time_to_icu_discharge_h = "Время до выписки из ОРИТ, ч",
        CGI_E_2lvl = "CGI-E: есть улучшения",
        SOFA_drop_2plus = "Снижение SOFA ≥ 2 за 72 ч",
        VIS_drop_20plus = "Снижение VIS2020 ≥ 20 за 72 ч",
        mortality = "Летальность"
      ),
      missing = "no"
    ) %>%
    bold_labels()
}

tbl4_all <- out_df_transfer %>%
  make_outcome_tbl()

tbl4_no_transfer <- out_df_transfer %>%
  filter(from_other_ICU_transfer != "Да" | is.na(from_other_ICU_transfer)) %>%
  make_outcome_tbl()

tbl4_transfer_compare <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = list(tbl4_all, tbl4_no_transfer),
  tab_spanner = c(
    paste0("**Все пациенты**, N = ", nrow(out_df_transfer)),
    paste0(
      "**Без перевода из другого ОРИТ**, N = ",
      out_df_transfer %>%
        filter(from_other_ICU_transfer != "Да" | is.na(from_other_ICU_transfer)) %>%
        nrow()
    )
  )
)

flx4_transfer_compare <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl4_transfer_compare) %>%
  flextable::autofit()

invisible(
  flextable::save_as_pptx(
    flx4_transfer_compare,
    path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table4_outcomes_all_vs_no_transfer.pptx")
  )
)

flx4_transfer_compare
```

### Исходы по МНО на T0

```{r}
#| label: pptx_slide4_inr_t0
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Аналог pptx_slide4_transfer, но пациенты делятся по МНО на T0:
# МНО < 1.4 vs МНО >= 1.4.
# T0 в текущем пайплайне кодируется как m12h_0h.

if (!"INR" %in% names(patients_analysis_clin_window)) {
  stop("В patients_analysis_clin_window нет столбца INR: сначала перезапустите ETL и пересоберите patients_tidy.rds.")
}

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"
tp1 <- "48h_72h"

out_df_inr_t0 <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    INR_m12 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(first_non_na(INR[timepoint == tp0]))),
    outcome_raw = first_non_na(outcome),
    CGI_E_raw   = first_non_na(.data[[cgi_col]]),

    ICU_in_dt = first_non_na(ICU_in_dt),
    ICU_out_or_death_dt = first_non_na(ICU_out_or_death_dt),

    SOFA_m12   = first_non_na(.data[[sofa_col]][timepoint == tp0]),
    SOFA_48_72 = first_non_na(.data[[sofa_col]][timepoint == tp1]),

    VIS_m12    = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp0]),
    VIS_48_72  = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp1]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    INR_group = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(INR_m12) & INR_m12 < 1.4  ~ "МНО < 1.4",
      !is.na(INR_m12) & INR_m12 >= 1.4 ~ "МНО ≥ 1.4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>%
      factor(levels = c("МНО < 1.4", "МНО ≥ 1.4")),

    outcome_norm = norm_txt(outcome_raw),

    time_to_icu_discharge_h = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Выписан из ОРИТ" & !is.na(ICU_in_dt) & !is.na(ICU_out_or_death_dt) ~
        as.numeric(difftime(ICU_out_or_death_dt, ICU_in_dt, units = "hours")),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    CGI_E_2lvl = {
      x <- norm_txt(CGI_E_raw)
      dplyr::case_when(
        x %in% c(
          "Без изменений или хуже",
          "Минимальное улучшение. Незначительное улучшение, не влияющее на клинический статус пациента"
        ) ~ "Нет улучшений",
        x %in% c(
          "Отмечено значительное улучшение. Полная или почти полная ремиссия симптомов",
          "Умеренное улучшение. Частичная ремиссия симптомов"
        ) ~ "Есть улучшения",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ) %>%
        factor(levels = c("Есть улучшения", "Нет улучшений"))
    },

    SOFA_drop_2plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(SOFA_m12) & !is.na(SOFA_48_72) ~ (SOFA_m12 - SOFA_48_72 >= 2),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    VIS_drop_20plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(VIS_m12) & !is.na(VIS_48_72) ~ (VIS_m12 - VIS_48_72 >= 20),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    mortality = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Умер" ~ "Умер",
      !is.na(outcome_norm)   ~ "Не умер",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Умер", "Не умер"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(INR_group))

tbl4_inr_t0 <- out_df_inr_t0 %>%
  select(
    INR_group,
    time_to_icu_discharge_h,
    CGI_E_2lvl,
    SOFA_drop_2plus,
    VIS_drop_20plus,
    mortality
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = INR_group,
    type = list(
      CGI_E_2lvl ~ "dichotomous",
      SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "dichotomous",
      VIS_drop_20plus ~ "dichotomous",
      mortality ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      CGI_E_2lvl ~ "Есть улучшения",
      SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "Да",
      VIS_drop_20plus ~ "Да",
      mortality ~ "Умер"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      time_to_icu_discharge_h ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{p}% ({n})"
    ),
    label = list(
      time_to_icu_discharge_h = "Время до выписки из ОРИТ, ч",
      CGI_E_2lvl = "CGI-E: есть улучшения",
      SOFA_drop_2plus = "Снижение SOFA ≥ 2 за 72 ч",
      VIS_drop_20plus = "Снижение VIS2020 ≥ 20 за 72 ч",
      mortality = "Летальность"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
  modify_caption("**Исходы в зависимости от МНО на T0**") %>%
  bold_labels()

flx4_inr_t0 <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl4_inr_t0) %>%
  flextable::autofit()

invisible(
  flextable::save_as_pptx(
    flx4_inr_t0,
    path = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "table4_outcomes_by_INR_T0.pptx")
  )
)

flx4_inr_t0
```

### Исходы: ранняя vs поздняя первая гемосорбция

```{r}
#| label: pptx_slide4_early_late_sorption
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Аналог Слайда 4, но вместо сравнения "все пациенты / без перевода из другого ОРИТ"
# делим пациентов по времени начала первой гемосорбции:
# ранняя = HA_start_dt <= ICU_in_dt + 24 часа,
# поздняя = HA_start_dt > ICU_in_dt + 24 часа.
# Берем только первую процедуру с HA_parameter == "Гемоперфузия 1".

# Отключаемый фильтр: TRUE = только LPS, FALSE = все типы картриджей.
pptx_slide4_early_late_lps_only <- TRUE

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"
tp1 <- "48h_72h"

# --- 1 строка на пациента: исходы и динамика по клиническому окну ---
out_df_early_late <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    outcome_raw = first_non_na(outcome),
    CGI_E_raw   = first_non_na(.data[[cgi_col]]),

    ICU_in_dt = first_non_na(ICU_in_dt),
    ICU_out_or_death_dt = first_non_na(ICU_out_or_death_dt),

    SOFA_m12   = first_non_na(SOFA[timepoint == tp0]),
    SOFA_48_72 = first_non_na(SOFA[timepoint == tp1]),

    VIS_m12    = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp0]),
    VIS_48_72  = first_non_na(.data[[vis_col]][timepoint == tp1]),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- Время первой гемосорбции ---
ha_first_sorption_src <- HA_tidy %>%
  filter(HA_parameter == "Гемоперфузия 1")

if (pptx_slide4_early_late_lps_only) {
  if (!"HA_cartrige_type_std" %in% names(ha_first_sorption_src)) {
    stop("В HA_tidy нет колонки HA_cartrige_type_std для LPS-фильтра.")
  }

  ha_first_sorption_src <- ha_first_sorption_src %>%
    filter(HA_cartrige_type_std == "LPS")
}

ha_first_sorption_timing <- ha_first_sorption_src %>%
  filter(!is.na(HA_start_dt)) %>%
  arrange(pat_record_id, HA_start_dt) %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    HA_start_dt = first_non_na(HA_start_dt),
    HA_cartrige_type_std = first_non_na(HA_cartrige_type_std),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- derived outcomes + группа ранняя/поздняя ---
out_df_early_late <- out_df_early_late %>%
  inner_join(ha_first_sorption_timing, by = "pat_record_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ICU_in_dt), !is.na(HA_start_dt)) %>%
  mutate(
    HA_start_timing = dplyr::case_when(
      HA_start_dt <= ICU_in_dt + lubridate::hours(24) ~ "Ранняя (≤24 ч)",
      HA_start_dt >  ICU_in_dt + lubridate::hours(24) ~ "Поздняя (>24 ч)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>%
      factor(levels = c("Ранняя (≤24 ч)", "Поздняя (>24 ч)")),

    outcome_norm = norm_txt(outcome_raw),

    time_to_icu_discharge_h = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Выписан из ОРИТ" & !is.na(ICU_in_dt) & !is.na(ICU_out_or_death_dt) ~
        as.numeric(difftime(ICU_out_or_death_dt, ICU_in_dt, units = "hours")),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    CGI_E_2lvl = {
      x <- norm_txt(CGI_E_raw)
      dplyr::case_when(
        x %in% c(
          "Без изменений или хуже",
          "Минимальное улучшение. Незначительное улучшение, не влияющее на клинический статус пациента"
        ) ~ "Нет улучшений",
        x %in% c(
          "Отмечено значительное улучшение. Полная или почти полная ремиссия симптомов",
          "Умеренное улучшение. Частичная ремиссия симптомов"
        ) ~ "Есть улучшения",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ) %>%
        factor(levels = c("Есть улучшения", "Нет улучшений"))
    },

    SOFA_drop_2plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(SOFA_m12) & !is.na(SOFA_48_72) ~ (SOFA_m12 - SOFA_48_72 >= 2),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    VIS_drop_20plus = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(VIS_m12) & !is.na(VIS_48_72) ~ (VIS_m12 - VIS_48_72 >= 20),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ) %>% factor(levels = c(TRUE, FALSE), labels = c("Да", "Нет")),

    mortality = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome_norm == "Умер" ~ "Умер",
      !is.na(outcome_norm)   ~ "Не умер",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Умер", "Не умер"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(HA_start_timing))

caption_slide4_early_late <- paste0(
  "**Исходы в зависимости от ранней/поздней первой гемосорбции",
  if (pptx_slide4_early_late_lps_only) " (только LPS)" else "",
  "**"
)

tbl4_early_late <- out_df_early_late %>%
  select(
    HA_start_timing,
    time_to_icu_discharge_h,
    CGI_E_2lvl,
    SOFA_drop_2plus,
    VIS_drop_20plus,
    mortality
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = HA_start_timing,
    type = list(
      CGI_E_2lvl ~ "dichotomous",
      SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "dichotomous",
      VIS_drop_20plus ~ "dichotomous",
      mortality ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    value = list(
      CGI_E_2lvl ~ "Есть улучшения",
      SOFA_drop_2plus ~ "Да",
      VIS_drop_20plus ~ "Да",
      mortality ~ "Умер"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      time_to_icu_discharge_h ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    label = list(
      time_to_icu_discharge_h = "Время до выписки из ОРИТ, ч",
      CGI_E_2lvl = "CGI-E: есть улучшения",
      SOFA_drop_2plus = "Снижение SOFA ≥ 2 за 72 ч",
      VIS_drop_20plus = "Снижение VIS2020 ≥ 20 за 72 ч",
      mortality = "Летальность"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}") %>%
  modify_caption(caption_slide4_early_late) %>%
  bold_labels()

flx4_early_late <- gtsummary::as_flex_table(tbl4_early_late) %>%
  flextable::autofit()

invisible(
  flextable::save_as_pptx(
    flx4_early_late,
    path = file.path(
      TABLES_DIR,
      if (pptx_slide4_early_late_lps_only) {
        "table4_outcomes_early_vs_late_sorption_LPS.pptx"
      } else {
        "table4_outcomes_early_vs_late_sorption_all_devices.pptx"
      }
    )
  )
)

flx4_early_late
```

### Пациенты/SOFA/VIS pair

```{r}
#| label: qc_pptx_slide4_counts
#| cache: false
#| echo: false

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

tp0 <- "m12h_0h"
tp1 <- "48h_72h"

# 1) Сколько строк и пациентов в исходном patients_analysis_clin_window
qc_rows <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_patients = n_distinct(pat_record_id)
  )

qc_pair_status <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id, timepoint) %>%
  count(pat_record_id, name = "n_timepoints") %>%
  count(n_timepoints, name = "n_patients")

# 2) Сколько пациентов попадает в out_df по группам
qc_out_df <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  group_by(pat_record_id) %>%
  summarise(
    first_sorption_type = first_non_na(first_sorption_type),
    SOFA_m12 = first_non_na(SOFA[timepoint == tp0]),
    SOFA_48_72 = first_non_na(SOFA[timepoint == tp1]),
    VIS_m12 = first_non_na(VIS2020_0_excl[timepoint == tp0]),
    VIS_48_72 = first_non_na(VIS2020_0_excl[timepoint == tp1]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    has_SOFA_pair = !is.na(SOFA_m12) & !is.na(SOFA_48_72),
    has_VIS_pair  = !is.na(VIS_m12) & !is.na(VIS_48_72)
  ) %>%
  group_by(first_sorption_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients_total = n(),
    n_with_SOFA_pair = sum(has_SOFA_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_with_VIS_pair  = sum(has_VIS_pair, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

qc_rows
qc_pair_status
qc_out_df
```

## Слайд 5. Графики

```{r}

#| label: plots_m12h_0h_48h_72h facet_wrap
#| cache: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggh4x)

# Предполагается, что выше уже создан patients_analysis_clin_window
tp_keep <- c("m12h_0h", "48h_72h")

# Подписи временных точек для оси X
tp_labels <- c(
  m12h_0h   = "-12-0 часов",
  `48h_72h` = "48-72 часа"
)

# Словарь short -> ru
var_label_map <- dict_pat %>%
  distinct(short, ru) %>%
  filter(!is.na(short), short != "", !is.na(ru), ru != "") %>%
  { setNames(.$ru, .$short) }

# Ручные подписи для отдельных переменных
manual_labels <- c(
  PaFiO2_calc    = "PaO2/FiO2 (расч.)",
  VIS2020_0_excl = "Индекс VIS2020"
)

lab_var <- function(v) {
  v <- as.character(v)

  lbl_manual <- unname(manual_labels[v])
  lbl_dict   <- unname(var_label_map[v])

  lbl <- ifelse(!is.na(lbl_manual) & lbl_manual != "", lbl_manual, lbl_dict)
  lbl[is.na(lbl) | lbl == ""] <- v[is.na(lbl) | lbl == ""]
  lbl
}

# Какие переменные рисуем
vars_facet_keep <- c("SOFA", "VIS2020_0_excl", "PaFiO2_calc", "lactate")
vars_plot <- intersect(vars_facet_keep, names(patients_analysis_clin_window))

# Для каких переменных нужна логарифмическая ось Y
vars_log_Y <- c("lactate", "VIS2020_0_excl")

# Берем только пациентов с first_sorption_type == "LPS"
plot_source <- patients_analysis_clin_window %>%
  filter(first_sorption_type == "LPS") %>%
  select(pat_record_id, timepoint, any_of(vars_plot))

plot_long <- plot_source %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(pat_record_id, timepoint),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_keep),
    variable_chr = as.character(variable),
    value_raw = as.numeric(value),
    value_plot = value_raw,
    variable_label = lab_var(variable_chr),
    variable_facet = dplyr::case_when(
      variable_chr == "VIS2020_0_excl" ~ paste0(variable_label, " (log10-axis)"),
      variable_chr == "lactate" ~ paste0(variable_label, " (log10-axis)"),
      TRUE ~ variable_label
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value_plot))

# Оставляем только полные пары для каждой переменной
plot_long_paired <- plot_long %>%
  group_by(variable_facet, pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(timepoint) == 2, n() == 2) %>%
  ungroup()

n_pairs <- plot_long_paired %>%
  distinct(pat_record_id) %>%
  nrow()

plot_lines <- plot_long_paired %>%
  group_by(variable_facet, pat_record_id) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(timepoint) == 2, n() == 2) %>%
  ungroup()

# p-value по Wilcoxon для каждой панели
pvals_df <- plot_long_paired %>%
  group_by(variable_facet) %>%
  summarise(
    p_txt = {
      w <- cur_data() %>%
        select(pat_record_id, timepoint, value_raw) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value_raw)

      if (
        nrow(w) >= 2 &&
        all(tp_keep %in% names(w)) &&
        sum(!is.na(w[[tp_keep[1]]]) & !is.na(w[[tp_keep[2]]])) >= 2
      ) {
        pval <- suppressWarnings(
          wilcox.test(
            x = w[[tp_keep[2]]],
            y = w[[tp_keep[1]]],
            paired = TRUE,
            exact = FALSE
          )$p.value
        )
        paste0("p = ", format.pval(pval, digits = 2, eps = 1e-3))
      } else {
        "p = NA"
      }
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

log_facets <- c(
  paste0(lab_var("VIS2020_0_excl"), " (log10-axis)"),
  paste0(lab_var("lactate"), " (log10-axis)")
)

p <- ggplot(plot_long_paired, aes(x = timepoint, y = value_plot)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = timepoint), outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.55) +
  geom_line(data = plot_lines, aes(group = pat_record_id), alpha = 0.20) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.008, height = 0),
    size = 0.9,
    alpha = 0.35
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable_facet, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = tp_labels) +
  geom_text(
    data = pvals_df,
    aes(x = tp_keep[2], y = Inf, label = p_txt),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 1.05,
    vjust = 1.2,
    size = 3
  ) +
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(
    y = list(
      variable_facet %in% log_facets ~ scale_y_log10(
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))
      ),
      TRUE ~ scale_y_continuous(
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1))
      )
    )
  ) +
labs(
  x = NULL,
  y = NULL,
  title = "Парные сравнения (только LPS)",
  subtitle = paste0("Число пациентов с полными парами: n = ", n_pairs)
) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p

# Сохраняем именно текущий график p в PNG,
# который потом будет вставлен в PowerPoint
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(GRAPHES_DIR, "slide5_facets.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Создаём PowerPoint с одним слайдом, на котором график занимает всю область слайда
ppt <- officer::read_pptx()
lsum <- officer::layout_summary(ppt)

ppt <- officer::add_slide(
  ppt,
  layout = lsum$layout[[1]],
  master = lsum$master[[1]]
)

ppt <- officer::ph_with(
  x = ppt,
  value = officer::external_img(file.path(GRAPHES_DIR, "slide5_facets.png"), width = 13.33, height = 7.5),
  location = officer::ph_location_fullsize()
)

print(ppt, target = file.path(TABLES_DIR, "slide5_facets.pptx"))
```
